reviews.author: Ahmed Kradi
reviews.text:
We went to Los Brothers for our last dinner in Paris, and wow — what a way to end the trip.

The place was absolutely buzzing. People were constantly coming and going, and it was clear this spot is popular for a reason. Even with how busy they were, the service was top notch. The staff stayed on top of everything, made sure we had what we needed, and kept things moving without ever making us feel rushed.

We ordered the platter to share, and it was so good. Everything was flavorful, fresh, and perfectly cooked. It’s one of those meals where you keep saying, “You have to try this,” back and forth across the table. Every bite delivered.

One of the best parts? Everything is halal, which made it an easy and comfortable choice for us.
Huge thank you to the team at Los Brothers for such a great experience. Keep killing it — we’ll definitely be back next time we’re in Paris!

reviews.author: WON YOUNG Kim
reviews.text: Great casual restaurant for Travellers. I like their fries the most, but other salad and burgers are good too. But it's different from usual American style burger. And no alcoholic drinks here.

reviews.author: Curt
reviews.text: Don't do it! Looks good from the outside, but the doner kebab was blah, cold, expensive and it was the worst service I have ever seen at a doner kebab shop in the many I have been to throughout the world. No lamb, only chicken, bread is more like a hoagie roll rather than a pita, meat and sauce were bland and tasteless, the few fries they provided were greasy, and not crisp, but the worst part was the service. It was just like an assembly line and they were yelling at customers, trying to hurry everyone up to take their food and pay. When my friend who had asked for mayonnaise on his fries came back to ask for ketchup, they were aggressive and told him no, that they had already given him mayonnaise, and sent him away. I can't make this stuff up. Just stay away!

reviews.author: Syrine Shell
reviews.text: I loved this restaurant and the atmosphere. The food is so tasty, the kebab is well seasoned and the quantities are generous. The workers are super nice,welcoming and well organised. Prices are fair.

reviews.author: İkbal Pınar
reviews.text: Quite crowded and apparently does lots of business. We were a large group and they mixed up a part of our order. The food is not of high standard but its good value for price. Some people in our group complained that their food was not cooked very well(burnt or not cooked enough) ; the kofta and the adana to be specific. Would not recommend if you are expecting a great cuisine but its good for students/ people on budget. The toilets are mixed and definitely not enough for this volume of people.

reviews.author: Shahzel Syed
reviews.text: The food here is tasty and very close to the original Turkish taste. I recommend this spot for having a quick adana kebab 😊 the staff is nice and the atmosphere is well typical of a Parisian street but ofcourse you are in Paris.

reviews.author: Lori Lam
reviews.text: one of the few spots serving food in paris late at night. we had been at a show and were looking for food around 10pm, which didn’t leave us many choices. but this place had what we needed. food and wine. the staff was already friendly and spoke english.

reviews.author: Sonya French
reviews.text: The food was beautifully presented and was fresh and delicious.  The service was excellent!  Our server spoke English and patiently answered questions about the menu.  We had a chicken, lamb/beef and vegetarian/vegan combo plate.  We would recommend this place.

reviews.author: ilovefood yay
reviews.text:
VERY YUMMY AND FAST SERVICE!!!!! The food was fresh and i don’t eat much turkish food but i really loved this one!!!
But the atmosphere felt a bit off, there was some sort of person coming around barking at us for a bit and left and came back and kept staring at my tables food😭😭 but we ignored him and he didn’t come back or say anything. There would sometimes be bees or flies flying around tho, if ur sitting outside. but we managed to get them off our food
I still really loved the three person combo we got tho!!! 100% recommended

reviews.author: Patrick Muk
reviews.text:
The food is great and  the staff create  an authentic feel. Reasonably, priced but the real selling point is the location.
Fabulous Turkish food in a beautiful Paris  location.
Meal for 2 - cost us €40

name: YEK - Kebab Parisien
address: 7 Rue des Lavandières Sainte-Opportune, 75001 Paris, France

reviews.author: Benjamin Parkes
reviews.text: Incredible. We were told by a friend that Paris does better Kebabs than Germany and UK by far so we had to test one out. By far the best kebab I’ve ever had. I got a mixed wrap, my partner got a donner kebab. We got 2 cans of orangina and a little baklova to finish all for €28. Service was quick and the staff were very accommodating given we speak basically no french!

reviews.author: Lorena Fortuna
reviews.text: Everything is so fresh! We had the agneau and doner (lamb gyro) platters along with börek (fried cheese rolls). Platters come with fries salad and rice. The staff is welcoming - love this place. A nice break from heavy stews and sauces.

reviews.author: Deborah King
reviews.text: Great doner kebab with chunks of meat sliced finely. Not processed sausage! We had lamb doner with lovely crisp slightly pickled salad, tomato infused rice and hot crispy chips. Glasses and big jug of water on the table. Cute glass of chai tea to finish. The 3 men working there were just charming. The place was packed with a lunch time crowd coming in for a quick, cheap tasty bread roll or wrap. Next time I'll have shish, like the man on the next table . Looked delish too.

reviews.author: Genesis Medina
reviews.text:
We were visiting France from California and decided to try this Mediterranean food spot, and it quickly became one of our favorites. The food was super good for the price, really affordable, and the quality was amazing. Everything tasted fresh, authentic, and full of flavor.

The guys working there were incredibly kind and friendly. They gave us great tips and new ideas on different foods to try around Paris, which made our trip even better. We loved it so much that we came back multiple times during our week-long stay. If you’re in Paris and want authentic Mediterranean food, great quality, and unbeatable prices, this place is a must.

reviews.author: Emil Gonter
reviews.text:
We had dinner recently at YEK Kebab, opting for two wraps and an Ayran drink. The wraps were quite tasty and came as a meal with fries, ketchup, and mayonnaise, which was a nice bonus. It's definitely a solid choice for a quick and satisfying dinner or lunch.
Inside, there are about eight tables available for dining in, but no outside seating. Given the area, this feels like a missed opportunity for the restaurant to offer a more appealing atmosphere, as the indoor setting is quite basic. Many customers also seemed to be getting takeout.
Overall, YEK Kebab delivers on tasty food for a fast meal, but don't expect a great dining atmosphere.

reviews.author: Doggy Dan
reviews.text: Amazing food (like the best) and great size portions, wonderful friendly service and fantastic atmosphere. 10/10

reviews.author: Linda Dourte
reviews.text: Amazing food, we love this restaurant so much that we have eaten here 3 times already ( we have only been here 2 days!)

reviews.author: Adrian Schmedler
reviews.text: Good food, friendly staff, reasonable price.

reviews.author: Abd El Kodous Souissi
reviews.text: Nice restaurant, friendly staff and delicious food. I had chicken skewers, and they were super juicy and they melt in tour mouth.

reviews.author: M L
reviews.text: Good Kebab, friendly and quick service, fresh quality.

name: Tarboush (Kebab Halal - Grillades au feu de bois- burgers)
address: 14 Rue de la Cossonnerie, 75001 Paris, France

reviews.author: Lee Montenegro
reviews.text: I love this place. Their food is very delicious and every time I come to France, I drive straight out to this place to eat there. Mix plates are so full and you can even share as the portions are very big. It’s almost like a mom and Pop store so the service is very good. The place is clean and comfortable seating.

reviews.author: Tahsin Rahman
reviews.text: This restaurant truly stands out as one of the best. The food is consistently delicious, beautifully presented, and full of fresh, vibrant flavors. The server (morad) is kind, attentive, and always makes guests feel welcome. The atmosphere is inviting and creates a wonderful dining experience each time I visit.

reviews.author: Paul Steve
reviews.text: I ordered an L Tacos with a kebab and curry chicken, a fanta, fries and the tiramisu. Tacos was fine except the chicken wasn't cooked properly, french fries - I wouldn't recommend (McDonald's fries is far more better than this) and finally Tiramisu is just a PURE SCAM whoever framed the recipe must need to use chatgpt for at least to know what is meant by Tiramisu! No Wifii? Seriously? I should've gone to McDonald's or O'Tacos! (4/10)

reviews.author: lina amara
reviews.text: The food was really delicious and the quantity was generous. The staff of the restaurant are super friendly, and they take good care of their customers. We would definitely go back!

reviews.author: Aymen Senisna
reviews.text:
The food is accutually faire quality especially the fries the waiters are kind and smiling, although i had a small incident i ordered merguez, which should come with 4 units but it came only woth 2.5  when  protested the waiters told  that me thes are big ones  but as far as i am concerned i only got 3
They compensated us with a small kebeb platter for that but i think it was only leftovers since it was cold
Still a good choice for a snack

reviews.author: S
reviews.text: Pretty good kebabs and fries. Very limited seating though

reviews.author: Ciro Borrelli
reviews.text:
Accidentally delicious pita break in the heart of Paris!

We stumbled upon this place while wandering around Paris, just looking for a quick bite — and we were craving a good pita. From the window, everything looked well-prepared and super appetizing, especially the gyros spinning behind the counter. That was enough to pull us in.

Inside, as you can see from the photos, the space is surprisingly large and quite nice. The service was lightning fast. We ordered the standard pitas — I had the one with cheese — and it was served perfectly, packed with flavor, and super satisfying.

Prices are very reasonable, especially for the area — actually pretty cheap for central Paris. Of course, it’s not French cuisine, but the quality is excellent, everything was clean, and it’s ideal for a quick and tasty break. Definitely recommended if you’re nearby and need a solid meal without fuss.

reviews.author: Zahra Khodadadi
reviews.text: Very delicious and fast and nice service in heart of Paris!

reviews.author: Yaz Sierra
reviews.text: It is good, but the spicy is not spicy haha like good Mexican, but is a good an cheap place to eat

reviews.author: Rahul Gupta
reviews.text: Great people & tasty food, I just wish the filling was more in the falafel!

name: Berliner Das Original - Kebab
address: CC Westfield Forum des Halles 101 Porte Berger Place de la Rotonde, près du cinéma UGC, 75001 Paris, France

reviews.author: Mithun Meritson
reviews.text:
Very disappointed with Berliner Das Original - Kebab. The food portion was noticeably smaller compared to other kebab shops nearby, yet the price was surprisingly high. To make matters worse, the taste was bland and not satisfying at all. And the meal was not freshly made .
Definitely not worth the money — I won’t be coming back.

reviews.author: Kenan Muratagic
reviews.text: This kebab has nothing to do with a kebab from Germany. The name "Berliner" (The Original) should be banned. It's far too small, and there are some strange vegetables in it that don't belong in a proper kebab. The wait time is far too long. It's not comparable to a kebab from Germany. The fries were quite good, though

reviews.author: Adil Jumabekov
reviews.text: as a german: not really a döner cause the bread is way different, more like a hard pita. chicken was still really good. fries also good

reviews.author: Mohamed ES-SANOUSY
reviews.text:
Really bad, not clean smell of pee in the floor and booth
The food is really bad
The chicken sandwich had nothing in it except one piece and a lot of just vegetables
Not coming back, and don't recommend
The tables are also dirty and it was only 12h30

reviews.author: Alexia
reviews.text: They gave me the wrong order and it was bad food

reviews.author: Off to see the World
reviews.text: Next to our flat for our one month summer stay in Paris. Super friendly and the food is affordable and delicious.  The portions is huge! One combo feed me and 2 kids. It’s a casual place to dine in or take out.  We took out but we would dine next time also.  Thank you for an awesome service! Great business!

reviews.author: Mr. V
reviews.text: Dry meat. Excellent veggies. Could use more sauce. Bread was acceptable. Service was rude! Asked a question and the snobby young man with a combover smirked at me in the most stereotypical French manner. No free water. Tough to get napkins. Reasonable prices for Paris.

reviews.author: Robert
reviews.text: The best kebab and culinary experience in Paris so far! We walked in expecting a quick fast-food meal but left with an unforgettable dining experience that rivals even high-end restaurants. On top of that, the staff is incredibly friendly, respectful, and attentive. An absolute must-visit!

reviews.author: JM Orozco
reviews.text: Good kebab spot overall. I ordered the L’Avocado — tasty, generous portion, and nicely prepared. The place was empty when I went, but it was very clean and well kept. The only downside was the French fries, which weren’t great. Still, the kebab itself was solid and flavorful. Worth a visit if you’re nearby and craving something quick and satisfying.

reviews.author: murat turan
reviews.text: It's absolutely fantastic and I think you should give it a try in this area. The portions are quite generous. It might be better to choose it as a menu.

name: L’Amour Du Kebab - Meilleur Kebab á Paris
address: 6 Rue du Faubourg Saint-Denis, 75010 Paris, France

reviews.author: Alireza Sepidbar
reviews.text:
It was wonderful. truly delicious. We tried the kebab menu tonight and everything was amazing: the service, the cleanliness, and especially the taste of the food. I really enjoyed it.
We also had tea, which was very good.
Definitely a 5/5. I highly recommend it.

reviews.author: Elena R.
reviews.text:
The food was very, very delicious.
At the beginning, we had some trouble understanding each other, but the staff was very friendly and tried to explain everything to us (we don’t speak French).🥰🫶🏾 thank u so much

reviews.author: Al
reviews.text: Great food and excellent customer service! The kebab wrap was delicious and the place is really clean. Definitely recommend.

reviews.author: vultra uiolet
reviews.text:
Disappointing experience.
The restaurant is like a typical kebab shop but the food was not good. The fries were not fried. Big chunky pieces and undercooked. The sandwich was just a lot of bread, little kebab, no sauce.
Definitely not worth the price.
Would not recommend

reviews.author: Valeed Abid
reviews.text: My mouth is watering from remembering l’amour… went probably 4 times in a week trip to Paris

reviews.author: Mohib Ur Rehman
reviews.text:
Tasty halal kebabs with great value
Baobab Kebab is an excellent place for delicious halal food in Paris. The kebabs are flavorful, well cooked, and served in generous portions. The meat is fresh, the sauces are tasty, and everything feels well prepared.
The service is quick and friendly, making it a great stop for a fast and satisfying meal. Prices are reasonable, especially for the quality and portion size. The place is clean and has a simple, casual atmosphere.
A very good option if you’re looking for reliable halal street food in Paris. Highly recommended!

reviews.author: Rashid Majedur
reviews.text:
This was the worst restaurant experience I’ve ever had. The staff were extremely rude. I ordered a maxi plate, and they served pre-prepared food that was cold. The French fries were stale, and when I asked them to replace the food or warm it up, they refused.
To make things worse, they turned off the lights while we were still eating. There were four of us, and every dish had the same issues. We paid €60 for four meals, but the food was so bad that we couldn’t eat it. We ended up leaving everything on the table and walking out.
Their attitude clearly showed that they don’t care at all about their customers.

reviews.author: RegardGourmand
reviews.text:
The food was good for the price and the portions were generous.
However the facilities were very unsanitary and the customer service and professionality could use lots of improvement. One of the workers was very pre-occupied filming his customers (without consent) and himself for social media.

reviews.author: Marjan Treneski
reviews.text: The Manager allowed us to have more Rice instead of the French fries, the dish was Great, Huge. If you want to enjoy something like fast food restaurant, this is nice place to visit, price is very good, the dishes cost 13.5€ and 14.5€. We had leftover and the Boss made it sure we took it on the go. Appreciated and Recommended.

reviews.author: Alan Pickersgill
reviews.text: Found this place and it looked really appealing with loads of people queuing to get kebabs etc. I ordered a mixed doner wrap (chicken & beef) with chilli sauce and mayo and a big helping if crispy chips. Plus a can of Coke for only €10 to sit down and eat in the restaurant.

reviews.author: Andrew Mallinson
reviews.text: Really good Falafel. Sitting area also has nice comfortable layout. Really enjoyed our meal here.

reviews.author: Martyna Czerniakiewicz
reviews.text: Very good kebab! Taste like home-made, very kind and helpful worker, who talked with us in English without any problems. He made us feel cared, he wanted to make sure with understanding us. That was so lovely! We felt so good here, and also food was tasty. Thank u!

reviews.author: Linda
reviews.text: Clean seating with nice tables downstairs with one bathroom. Kebab meal was reasonably priced at €12. There are downstairs seating for groups up to 6 and booth seating. The people at the register were able to speak English and clarified the menu items for me when I needed it.

reviews.author: Tomer Helzer
reviews.text: Tasty food with budget friendly prices. We got the kebab and french fries and it was delicious. Also good seating downstairs with plenty of room to eat.

reviews.author: Knox Coulter
reviews.text: My first kebab experience was an amazing one here! For €9.90, my girlfriend and I split the kebab and chips and drink and it was the perfect amount of food, and just so so tasty. I ate downstairs where there’s seating  that’s very clean and comfortable. Everyone that works there was really friendly and communicated great even though I’m a non-French speaker! GO HERE

reviews.author: Nelson Cuberos L.
reviews.text: Excellent, 10 points, cheap, excellent food and attention. 👍🏻👍🏻👍🏻

reviews.author: Taty
reviews.text: good fast food place, kebab juicy and tasty, fast service

reviews.author: Kevin Mukam
reviews.text: So good

reviews.author: thè glacé
reviews.text: Cheap but very delicious.

reviews.author: João Viegas
reviews.text: The best kebab

reviews.author: Helene Suos
reviews.text: An amazing kebab spot with only two locations, including this one in a charming Parisian neighborhood. The place is small, but we got lucky and found a table. We ordered two kebabs—one in a wrap—and everything was incredibly tasty and flavorful. The homemade fries were absolutely delicious! A great find for anyone craving a quality kebab in Paris.

reviews.author: Yass
reviews.text: Very good kebab sandwich. Ive already eaten 3 times here. did not disappoint

reviews.author: Mohamed Haarish
reviews.text: Wow! Best Lebanese kebab. Nothing more to say. The spicy sauce was amazing for an Indian who miss his own food

reviews.author: Bruno Bensaid
reviews.text: Excellent home-made kebab. Great taste, plentiful and generous, and great fries. On the slight minus, not a great sitting experience and tap water not readily available. The pita bread. Overall it is a good 4.5 stars (but not a 5, as the top spot is still held by Grillé near Opera). We will be back.

reviews.author: Julien Salvi
reviews.text: Always great! If you're looking for a good kebab spot in Paris that's definitely the place. Durum is very tasty and comes with a huge portion of fries.

name: Urfa Durum
address: 58 Rue du Faubourg Saint-Denis, 75010 Paris, France

reviews.author: Johnny Novo
reviews.text:
Similar to every other American who has come to Urfa Dürüm, I came here because Anthony Bourdain highly recommended it.

It’s a Kurdish restaurant in a gritty part of Paris that sells dürüm wraps, which are essentially a Turkish street food made by rolling soft flatbread around grilled meat and fresh vegetables. After a rough first meal in the City of Light that was a €50 half chicken, my soul needed this.

Everything is made to order right in front of your face, and it SHOWS. We went with a chicken and a beef durum that ran €9.50, which gave my Chase Sapphire Preferred card a much needed breather.

I’m struggling to find adjectives that describe how good this soft flatbread was, and I’m rarely at a loss for words. The best I can come up with is “tangibly fresh.” I preferred the beef to the chicken, as it almost melted in your mouth. So damn tender.

Whenever anyone asks me for a Paris rec, Urfa Dürüm will be right near the top of my list. A must hit when in the city that the US Men's Basketball team won a 2024 gold medal in.

IG @johnny.novo
Tiktok @jnov__
Substack @johnnynovo

reviews.author: K G
reviews.text: Everything was on point! The food was so good, and the service was like a warm hug: clean, tasty, and friendly. Seriously, the best Kurdish kebab ever!

reviews.author: emre biyikli
reviews.text:
Service could be better. Asked for excluding onion, did not happen.
Durum is good, wrap bread is fresh made to the order, charcoal grill aroma is present in the durum.

reviews.author: Caitlin R
reviews.text:
I love this place hungrier than when I came. I don’t know what it is, but I need more places to start adding sauces onto their food.

First off most of my meat had so much fat on it that I could barely eat it or I had to spit it out.

It was very dry and needed some sort of sauce or spice. It was just lacking flavor.

I took a few bites and gave up after chewing on so much fat.

I really wanted to love this because I am a big kebab girl

reviews.author: Danielle Tattersall
reviews.text:
Stopped for a super quick dinner after noticing Urfa Durum the previous evening.
Nothing but fresh and efficient.
The Vegetarian wrap was awesome !! Well done e from Sydney Australia

reviews.author: Michael Blok
reviews.text:
Informal restauran/snackbar/takeaway restaurant. We really enjoyed our dinner here.
Food in the Lebanese, Greek, Indian, Turkish and French styles. Everything is fresh and very tasty.
You can sit outside even in Winter, covered against the rain. It's nice to see the people walk by on this atmospheric street.
Vegetarian options include an omelette sandwich and falafel.
Service is friendly and very quick. Prices are affordable.
This is central Paris so parking is not easy. But access by public transportation is great.

reviews.author: Lisi W.
reviews.text: Sample plate included Lamb, beef, chicken and pork. Was absolutely fresh and delicious! Price was unbelievable! Service was it excellent. When in Paris, be certain to visit New Antalya. You will not be disappointed.

reviews.author: Eduardo M
reviews.text: Very good! The kebab is great and the place is clean, receptful, nice.

reviews.author: lama habib mardini
reviews.text: We had chicken shawerma🌯 and yougurt drink🥛"laban 3eiraan"  it was delicious 😋😋but missing the pickles and toom "garlic"sauce!

reviews.author: sameer sethi
reviews.text: Good food, seating is just on the road corner, you will feel European vibes at latin quarter

reviews.author: Daniel Sovinski
reviews.text: Really solid gyros overall. The meat was flavorful, but the tzatziki sauce was the real highlight — fresh, creamy, and perfectly balanced. The fries were served on the side instead of inside the gyros, which was a bit unusual at first, but surprisingly tasty. Not perfect, but enjoyable — 7/10, would recommend.

reviews.author: Strsljen47
reviews.text: The portions were generous, and the food was cooked perfectly, exactly as it should be. I requested a portion without vegetables, and the gentleman kindly provided double fries and something similar to rice instead, without me even asking. That was a very thoughtful gesture on his part. 👋🏻

reviews.author: Pono Guerrero
reviews.text: This place was awesome, the food was good and they stayed open late til 2am. I had this place a couple of time the first time I got the works and it was a pile of food with a lamb chop on top. Everything was very delicious.

reviews.author: amelia michalczyk
reviews.text:
amazing service as well as food
the food was prepared quickly, it was delicious and you get the best portion for the price you pay
thanks!

reviews.author: Yang Shi
reviews.text: Went with my mother. These guys are legit. I’ve had kebab pretty much everywhere and love good food, so trust me when I say this is a place you definitely should visit if you are in the Latin quarter. The meat is succulent and fresh veggies are abound in the wrap along with a helping dose of hospitality. It is worth it! Much love guys if you read this. Your good food and hospitality made my Mother’s Day and mine.

reviews.author: NoteAndroid
reviews.text:
I had to return in Sep 2023. Again really nice staffs with excellent service. Still love their mixed vegetable over couscous, chicken kebob, lambchops EU$17. Thank you for staying open and wishing you guys the continuous success for years to come.
Below was my review in 2018.
Very rare I give 5 stars.  Carthage 2 is way too far from the finest 5 stars restaurants in Paris.  The used, and aged tables with chipped corners to the low quality utensils and plain paper napkins.  No where near 5.  However; it offers late, and even later night full dinner for the hunger, lost, and even more the drunks to have a good, clean hot meal yet cost at the "people' price".  Moroccan Vegetables Couscous is very fresh cook to order and the hot (temperature) vegetable stew is not spicy at all.  Along side is the chicken kebab, fresh lamb chop, and sausage (a bit spicy and salty with a heavy seasoning/flavor).  All is EU12 at this date: Sept 6, 2018.  Consumed at 12am.  I was not the only one order this dish at mid night hours.  After a 7 hours of photo shoot in the cold early September Wednesday night, I'm starving and cold.  The staffs offer no attitude but fast delivery to all guests either sit and dine in (that would be me and others) or take away.  This place reminds me almost like the Restaurant Pyramids in the Giza Plateau in Cairo, Egypt.  I will be here again to dine in few nights after this coming weekend late night photo shoots.

reviews.author: Alexandru Voicu-Vulcănean
reviews.text:
I ate here three times and enjoyed it every time.
I served "Assiette Kebab" and also Crepes.
Delicious.
We received cold water for free when we asked for it and the waitress is beautiful as an angel.
When she smiles, the whole room shines.
When requested, I was able to pay partially with my Sodexo Card (Food Vouchers) and partially with Cash/Credit Card.
I will gladly return there to eat (not only for the waitress).

reviews.author: Frank Mansell
reviews.text: Top kebab in here last night after an evening of drinking. The service was quick and efficient, and the actual food tasted great. What’s more, the amount of food for the price was exceptional value for the area and time of day, which leads me to believe I will definitely be back to have another. Thanks very much - Carthage 2 did not disappoint.

reviews.author: Michele Gerardi
reviews.text: Thank you for the crepes! You made our school trip wonderful!

reviews.author: Amel Nougha
reviews.text: It was really great and the vibes were warm i highly recommend 🫶🏻🤌🏻

name: Restaurant La Goulette
address: 59 Rue de la Verrerie, 75004 Paris, France

reviews.author: Likhit K
reviews.text: Very mediocre place. The chicken burger was good but the flavours were all over the place. The panini was also quite dry. The meat was good however. Even the packaged ayran felt too salty. The interiors are small, space good enough for groups of 2 people.

reviews.author: Celic Dorig
reviews.text: Amazing Kebab, we loved the meat, I don’t know why the people write bad reviews, in my personal experience was really good, the fries super hot and fresh! The staff super super nice and they gave us a lot of extra samourai sauce!

reviews.author: Henry Curchod
reviews.text: Look, it's clearly not the sharpest tool in the shed. It can be a bit 'hit and miss' but honestly it's the only place I truly adore in Paris. Every time I come to Paris, which is often, I head straight here on my first day. I order a chicken wrap, avec harissa and sauce ail, sans tomates, avec les frites a l'intérieur. This particular order is something I'm deeply passionate about, and I try at different places around the country. They execute it just the way it should be, without fuss, and at very competitive prices. I do sometimes get a little upset in the tummy after, but what do you expect. It's a takeaway place for builders and workers. If you want Michelin food obviously you shouldn't be coming here, but if you want a spicy delicious french/Mediterranean style kebab, just order what I ordered above and be grateful that you're alive and get on with your day.

reviews.author: Lynda A
reviews.text:
Not a real kebab, it doesn’t taste anything like a real kebab. The meat was burnt, not sure what else was in the tortilla as they don’t have regular kebab bread, or if they do they never asked us what we wanted. Very small kebab. They don’t put the sauce in the tortilla but on the tray with your fries. White sauce was more like mayonnaise, no taste to it, and for sure not homemade.

Not very welcoming staff.

reviews.author: Ori Big
reviews.text: Food was decent for price (9€). It’s an small Arabic style restaurant with a big verity of the menu, it’s coming with fries and a choice of drink.x3 small table inside to dine in. Parking place is hard and tight. Good to know that around this area is LGBT area and a kinda strange vibe especially at nights.

reviews.author: Wendy Hammond
reviews.text: The owner was extremely friendly and welcoming. He offered great suggestions and the food is fantastic.

reviews.author: LeAnn Taylor
reviews.text: We found this restaurant on our last night in Paris, just down the street from our hotel. We wish we found it sooner! The food was excellent and the service was amazing. Our French is not amazing, and the owner (? we presume) was so kind, and even made us feel better about our lack of fluency by joking with us about the words we COULD say. We appreciated his willingness to not only speak in English for us, but to explain his menu and how to order as well, preemptively eliminating any anxiety we may have had. If we had discovered this spot sooner in our stay we would surely have eaten here at least once more.

reviews.author: Paul Barlow
reviews.text:
What a brilliant spot, the guys outside were super friendly and the owner told us it'd be the best food we would find in the area... he was right.
Turkish kebab with a French twist was as unexpected as it was delicious. The Radlett  kebabe was mega

reviews.author: Steve Capone Jr
reviews.text: Totally legit, good food. The flavors aren’t what I’ve come to expect based on Berlin-based kebap shops, but this isn’t Berlin, and the dude running the place has the scene on lockdown. Worth your visit. Reasonably priced.

reviews.author: Emma Jane Wilde
reviews.text: We searched for gyros and found this little gem! The owner was working and made us the most delicious meal of chicken broche - the French version! Most sauces are made in house along with the bread and chips! We had a wonderful experience and would recommend anyone to go here

reviews.author: Noman Sajjad
reviews.text: Good halal food experience at Paris. The staff is good and Muslim . Pizza was excellent

reviews.author: Saksham
reviews.text: Best experience during my trip to Paris! The owners and staff at Marmaris Pizza are incredibly kind and welcoming. They made me feel like a friend from the moment I walked in. Even when I was in a rush, they went out of their way to help me, and their generosity was unforgettable. The pizza was delicious, but it was the warm atmosphere and amazing people that made this place truly special. Highly recommended!

reviews.author: Hashim Kazmi
reviews.text:
I am from Belgium and I have got to say this place is awesome the food is awesome the service is very nice. They are very welcoming.

No regrets ✌🇧🇪

reviews.author: fleck fletcher
reviews.text:
I gave a bad review a few years ago, was never going back, but was out with friends & they wanted to go so reluctantly agreed, so glad I did, it has massively improved, staff are friendly & all pizzas are now freshly made, very competitive prices in an area of paris that has a lot of competition.
It is now one of my highly reccomended places.

reviews.author: Gustavo A
reviews.text: Every time I come to Paris I take a kebab there.

name: Istanbul Kebab
address: 26 Rue du Faubourg Montmartre, 75009 Paris, France

reviews.author: Javid Yusubov
reviews.text: The food was absolutely delicious. Both the taste and presentation exceeded my expectations. You can really tell that fresh, high-quality ingredients are used. I would definitely come back again and highly recommend this place.

reviews.author: Sebastian Diaz Cuesta
reviews.text: We go there to taste the original Kebab and was really delicious. 100% recommended to all the people coming around.

reviews.author: N. H.
reviews.text: Worst kebab meat I’ve ever had. Zero flavor. And the white sauce was mostly mayonnaise. Never had a kebab with such little flavor.

reviews.author: Raffi Mesdjian
reviews.text: Food lacked the spices that makes the meat tasty.  The mean also was fatty and somewhat hard to chew.  I am very familiar with Turkish cuisine and this did not meet my expectation.

reviews.author: Rebecca G
reviews.text: This place is a must go to! The two workers were lovely to communicate with - even with a language barrier (due to us speaking English) and supplied the best kebabs and chips! Decent size serving and above and beyond service. Highly recommend!!

reviews.author: Mariana guerrero
reviews.text:
This place it’s absolutely fantastic. The staff is so nice, they treat you with so much respect and are so friendly. The food? One of the best doners I had in my life, so delicious. The home fries were also on point. My friend is vegan and she said is one of the best she had in her life.

I would come back to Paris just 4 this place 🫶🏽🫶🏽🫶🏽

reviews.author: Peggy W
reviews.text: The food was delicious. Although it’s not a new restaurant, it was quite clean. The staff were all very kind and friendly, and we had a really pleasant dining experience. Thank you.

reviews.author: TT JR
reviews.text:
HALAL FOOD ALHAMDULILLAH !

Beef Doner was delicious and well portioned, I especially like the homemade twice-fried fries.

Service team speaks English, kind and friendly.

Toilet is kept clean for customers.

TQ and I see you again !

reviews.author: Elisa Sala
reviews.text: Very nice and kind staff, food is delicious. Vegan friendly, the vegan option is so good. Fast service also. Very recommended 😍

reviews.author: Ерасыл Абеуов
reviews.text: Extremely nice service😁😁Very tasty!! For nice price you get lots of food

name: Munich Kebab
address: 71 Rue du Faubourg Saint-Denis, 75010 Paris, France

reviews.author: Trang Nguyễn
reviews.text: It was good in general, the portion was really big that I couldn't finished at once. I had to bring home. The fries was good, the meat are ok - it fited my taste, wasn't salty. The package looked very good. The  atmosphere is better than some other kebab places, there are some table inside and outside so you can have fresh air without worrying kebab smell adhere into your clothes. In overall, it was good

reviews.author: W L
reviews.text: I was in the neighborhood, and saw this kebab by chance. My friend said it was really good, and that this kind of fusion kebab was trendy. It was indeed really tasty. The fresh high-quality ingredients and the balance in the mixture made the kebab of higher quality than most kebabs in Paris. Plenty of seats inside and outside. Service was quick. Prices are reasonable and portions are generous.

reviews.author: Simon Rushton
reviews.text:
This place has a good name for tasty kebabs, and I've been going there for years. However tonight wasn't so good. I bought a standard kebab at 21. By 23h I was stuck in the toilet, emptying my self from both ends. After spending over half an hour violently rejecting the kebab, I thought I'd better return to the Munich to warn them to look after their other customers. However I was first told to shut up so the other customers didn't hear ,then a guy came out from the back and started aggressively arguing so I told him he needs to address the issue to protect his customers and left as I wasn't there to argue.

It's a shame they didn't want to look into the issue, so I must leave this warning here.

reviews.author: Alex A
reviews.text:
Comparing and rating Döner is difficult. Every Döner can be different, there are main ingredients, but the toppings and sauce can vary, similar to a burger.
This one is tasty and very authentic to German kebab Döner.
The Sauce is good and very prominent, the size is the only thing I have to complain about (with 8€ for a sandwich or wrap). I guess both complaints could be solved by adding a tiny bit more other ingredients.
The service is good and accommodating to someone not speaking French.

reviews.author: Arianna Dani
reviews.text: Nice spot! Affordable prices and excellent food. I highly recommend the vegan dishes! On top of that the bathroom is super clean.

reviews.author: Nika Kovač
reviews.text: Such a pleasant experience. The crispy chicken wrap was amazing and the fries were perfect! The waiters are wonderful. The food comes very fast. Amazing music too!😙

reviews.author: Mohamed Firdaus
reviews.text: Good kebab near Lourve. I ordered the kebab bowl and it was tasty!

reviews.author: Alexis Capati
reviews.text:
Delicious and filling!

Service: 9/10
Vibe: 7/10 - a bit tight when it gets crowded!
Chicken bowl: 8.5/10 - I might remove the tomatoes and pomegranate next time
Onion rings: 8/10

Overall: 8.2/10 (4/5)

reviews.author: Ziad Tamim
reviews.text: Having previously lived in Germany, I found this experience quite disappointing. The flavour was entirely lacking, and the portion of meat provided did not justify the cost, which seemed excessive. Regrettably, I will not be returning.

reviews.author: Samuel Jones
reviews.text:
Some of the best Kebab I've ever eaten, I ordered the standard Kebab thinking it would be basic. Imagine my surprise when it had pomegranate seeds and cottage cheese! The unique blend of flavors was amazing. I would eat here every day if I could, it's really that good.

The restaurant itself was neat and well put together, albeit a little small. Unless you plan on taking the food out, I wouldn't take a group bigger then 8 people.

The service was fast, and the kiosks were easy to use. I got my food within 5 minutes, and it was everything I could have hoped for.

11/10 loved the food, service, and speed; I highly recommend eating here 👍

reviews.author: Waverly Bair
reviews.text:
Hands-down, one of my tried and true favorites for a delicious, flavorful, consistently good meal!

I went here for the first time back in 2023 and it left a lasting impression. The Algerian sauce that comes on the kebab is out of this world and I wish we had it in the US.

The staff is friendly and attentive, and made sure that my kebab had all the right toppings on it. I saved some for my friend to try later and she said it was one of the best things she tasted on this trip to Paris.

10/10 recommend!!

reviews.author: Aaron Anderson
reviews.text: We had the kebabs with fries and they were absolutely amazing! Everything was super fresh—the meat, veggies, and sauces were all top quality. The flavor was incredible, and service was fast. Definitely one of the best kebab spots I've been to. Wish we had places like this back in the US. Highly recommend!

reviews.author: Bima Algasha
reviews.text: Good food with generous portions and reasonable prices. The kebabs and burgers are tasty, made with fresh ingredients, and served quickly. Friendly service and a convenient location. A solid choice for a quick and satisfying meal.

reviews.author: Elijah Hughes
reviews.text: This meal saved me after roaming around Paris for hours, definitely the best shawarma I’ve had. Will be back!

reviews.author: Tim Vasvi
reviews.text:
Amazing food and world class service. Having seen all the reviews whilst looking for halal friendly places to eat in Paris, we knew we had to give it a try. I am so glad we did.

The service you are greeted with is excellent. Then the food arrives and it just gets better. We had the kebab sandwich the first time we visited and it was delicious. The vegetables really added that extra layer of flavour. The chips are delicious and come with some great sauces for you to dip them in.

We were so impressed with the food we went back the following day to try the Merguez, and little surprise that it was also delicious. If you've ever tasted Turkish spicy sausage, it's very similar in taste.

Don't let the size of the place deter you from what is an absolute gem of an eatery in Paris. Hands down some of the best food we've tasted anywhere.

reviews.author: Gabriel Severin
reviews.text: We went there twice during our stay in Paris, and it was absolutely worth it. The food is delicious, full of authentic Turkish flavors, and you can really feel the warmth of a family-run restaurant. Their baklava is simply outstanding  the best in Paris and honestly one of the best I’ve had anywhere in Europe. Highly recommended!

reviews.author: Piyal B
reviews.text: Fantastic food and service. Melt in the mouth Adana kebab and baklava. Absolutely loved it!

reviews.author: Arjun Kundra
reviews.text: What a gem! Amazing food and welcoming staff. Would 100% recommend. The Homemade Ayran was sooo goood. I got the lamb bowl and wife got the chicken bowl - both were amazing. The bowls come with fresh handmade bread as a bonus - Highly recommend!

reviews.author: Sarah Denise Knitter
reviews.text:
​SAZ Durum & Lahmacun is an absolute gem!
​The service is super friendly, the food is top-notch (seriously delicious!), and everything is incredibly affordable. It’s the perfect spot for a quick, excellent, and budget-friendly meal. Highly recommended!

reviews.author: Diana Tan
reviews.text: Had a wonderful dining experience here! We ordered the chicken bowl — it was served hot, beautifully plated, and absolutely full of flavour. Every bite was perfect! The staffs were also very friendly and welcoming, which made the meal even more enjoyable. Highly recommend this place for anyone who loves delicious and authentic Turkish food!

name: Kebap Haus
address: 109 Rue du Faubourg Saint-Denis, 75010 Paris, France

reviews.author: Crinu Bodiu
reviews.text:
For a 10 minutes walk from Gare du Nord, the food is extremely good.

The staff is very polite and he executed my food demand very well, he heard his client order.

Very good atmosphere also

reviews.author: Laeeq Khan
reviews.text: Loved this place! Portion size is huge. The taste is great. Very friendly staff.

reviews.author: zohaib asim
reviews.text: Really nice food decent price good quality and tasty as hell

reviews.author: Intan Chabanel
reviews.text: If you are in the area, must visit this place. Friendly welcoming, kebab taste so good and big portions! And the price is cheap compared another place. Will come again!

reviews.author: Gab Developer
reviews.text: The best Kebab in this Area, small place, very nice and warm

name: Paristanbul Gare de l’Est
address: 116 Rue du Faubourg Saint-Martin, 75010 Paris, France

reviews.author: N D
reviews.text:
We had an amazing experience at this Turkish restaurant! The food was absolutely delicious, especially the meat – it was perfectly cooked, very fresh, and full of flavor. My husband and I were truly impressed.

The prices are more than fair for the quality and portions you get. It’s rare to find such great value, especially in Paris. We are visiting from Germany, and honestly, we haven’t eaten this well anywhere else in Paris.

The staff were incredibly kind, welcoming, and attentive, which made the experience even better. We felt very comfortable and well taken care of.

We will definitely come back again. Highly recommended!

reviews.author: Ben ben
reviews.text:
Absolutely amazing kebab right next to Gare de l’Est!
The food is incredibly tasty, fresh, and generously served. The meat is perfectly cooked, the bread is warm, and the sauces are spot on.
On top of that, the staff is super friendly and welcoming — you feel at home from the first minute.
If you’re arriving in Paris or catching a train, this place is a must-stop. One of the best kebabs I’ve had in Paris. Highly recommended!

reviews.author: ShaN Da VooT
reviews.text: Good Food with good Price. Staffs are polite and helpful. Close to Gare de l'Est station.

reviews.author: Phymene
reviews.text: One of the best places I’ve tried during my trip to Paris, extremely good halal food with huge shares and affordable prices. I recommend it!

reviews.author: Meiqi Ismail
reviews.text: We had a feast here! The food was very delicious! Turkish sauce was super yummy and the lamb chop was done to perfection. Service was exceptional! They kindly explained to us what each item on the menu is and waited patiently to decide. Worth a visit! ✨

name: Délices aux mille et une épices

reviews.author: lel
reviews.text:
One of the best Parisian kebab, meet and sauce are delightful.
The cat "filou" will welcome you !
Ask the chief " the best sauce combo" and enjoy !!
I need to come back to try the vegetarian which is as we said one of the best too.

reviews.author: Tyler Queen
reviews.text: Amazing kebab place. Super awesome owner who we chatted with for half an hour or so. Has a sweet cat named filou who made our night! Well worth the cheap prices.

reviews.author: craig slota
reviews.text: I was in the Rue Saint Maur area and it was late and I was hungry.  I stopped into Delices aux mille et une epices (which honestly the name might be a bit too long) and ordered not one but 2 sandwiches.

reviews.author: Caroline Bartunek
reviews.text: It was almost midnight when we stopped here and grabbed a bite to eat. Service was very friendly, the owner spoke great English and the food was super tasty and the place was very clean which is a plus for me.

reviews.author: Alexander Bachmann
reviews.text: One of the very best Kebabs I've eaten in years, including some varieties I've never seen before.

reviews.author: Isabelle Papenfuss
reviews.text: “Fast-food,” type place offering kebabs, sandwiches, burgers, and france style “tacos.” I would say it’s much less expensive than most places in Paris. We had a classic kebab and one curry one. The curry wasn’t super flavorful or anything but it was tasty and they definitely don’t skimp. Would recommend

reviews.author: sasan rezaie
reviews.text:
I have been in paris for 7 days now and it is very difficult to find good food for reasonable price.
Here, we ordered pizza and it was the best I have had so far and it was not expensive at all.
Staff were super nice and generous

Highly recommended!

reviews.author: Bishal Sharma
reviews.text: The food is extremely good and it's very cheap as well

reviews.author: Ayyub Abdush-Shakur
reviews.text: MashaAllah. This was my go to most nights. Very good service and very tasty food. HIGHLY RECOMMEND. Plus they stay open late!

reviews.author: Everton
reviews.text: Best kebab in Paris. Delicious, good price and good service.

name: Istanbul Kebab
address: 2 Rue de la Folie Méricourt, 75011 Paris, France

reviews.author: Alain ANDRE
reviews.text: Great for a kebab. One evening after a show, I was feeling a bit peckish and decided to eat in. The waiter was friendly, the service was quick, and the meat was very good. The fries were crispy. No complaints...

reviews.author: COMPTOIR CONSTRUCTION
reviews.text: Disgusting! He handles his phone and then touches the bread before serving you. And he told me it was normal and that he shouldn't even take my order because he was on the phone. Definitely avoid this place.

reviews.author: Jc Million
reviews.text: Super good!!!! And the staff are lovely!!! I often go there at lunchtime and I won't change my habits!!

reviews.author: daria
reviews.text: It's simply excellent (we had the falafel sandwich)

reviews.author: Phil
reviews.text: I'm passing through, I'm from Grenoble, I ate here and it's very beautiful

name: Kebab Halal Star Food 11
address: 52 Av. de la République, 75011 Paris, France

reviews.author: Dr Nislam
reviews.text: Very tasty foods, generous amount, nice and kind person. Highly recommended!

reviews.author: Maz Zalan
reviews.text:
The food is goood, but the portion is wayy too massive for a person.
Tried Adana, the beef was tender and nicely cooked / grilled.

The set comes with fries which was crispy and tasty.

But i got trapped with the 'green chilli', which i thought it was not spicy, but it was!! Try to eat bit by bit, see if you can have it all.

reviews.author: Jules Boudet
reviews.text: Good Kebab, the price is okay and the owner gifted us a Fanta bottle to share because we came in a group of 8.

reviews.author: Britt Hulley
reviews.text: A very tasty, fresh Kebab, friendly service and great price.

reviews.author: Sophie
reviews.text: Great food amazing staff lovely atmosphere!!!

reviews.author: J P
reviews.text:
I just moved to Paris for a year and was wandering around doing some shopping and got hungry. Walking around this felt like a non-tourist trap and walked in. 3pm on rainy Sunday in February and saw couple local students(?) come and go a couple times while I ate.

The lady and the chef was really nice, both spoke very good English and I didn’t feel pressured at all. Price was 14 euros for a plate and soda and I feel like it was not expensive at all for what I got. It was actually even cheap…..coming from San Francisco.

I may stroll around here sometimes and I wanna try many other places but if I want Lebanese/turkish food, I will definitely come here again.

Both of the people working here were very nice with a smile and I am very happy this ended being the first place I ate in this trip. I really wish them well and good business.

reviews.author: Ibrahim Sukkar
reviews.text: Very nice staff and really good food. 5 stars!

reviews.author: Katerina Savvidi
reviews.text:
Really nice food and the staff was
so polite and willing to please us. My little daughter aks for water and because the mineral end they went to buy from an other shop. They even treat us a desert.I recommend it 100%.

reviews.author: Eltun Kazimli
reviews.text:
Just one sentence: The best restaurant in Paris!
Food, prices, service; everything is literally amazing!!! They even give tea or coffee for free after food.

reviews.author: Ken Lee
reviews.text: Super friendly patrons who make their own kebab and desserts. Good price for quality homemade Turkish cuisine in Paris!

name: Pacha Restaurant
address: 4 Bis Rue des Écoles, 75005 Paris, France

reviews.author: Are Granhaug
reviews.text: Sandwich kebab & soda for 10€. Same thing is called "sandwich grec" in some other places. Really, really good, just what I wanted. Pictured with harisssa and mayonnaise.

reviews.author: Johnny Jiang
reviews.text:
Amazing Local Gem with Warm Service!

Although Pacha is a small restaurant with a modest storefront and simple décor, it truly stands out for its exceptional hospitality and delicious, generous meals. The Turkish owner and staff were incredibly kind, attentive, and welcoming.

During my 8-night stay in Paris, I chose to have dinner here three times—that’s how much I enjoyed it! Every visit was a delightful experience, thanks to the warm atmosphere and the satisfying portions of flavorful food.

Highly recommend this place if you’re looking for a cozy, genuine spot with heartwarming service in Paris.

reviews.author: Devang Mistry
reviews.text: Fantastic place serving authentic Mediterranean food, the owner is very sweet and welcoming. We got the falafel platter and falafel wrap. Both were amazing, platter was very generous in portions. The food is authentic, baklava is an absolute must to end your dinner with, highly recommended!

reviews.author: Will B
reviews.text: I've been eating a lot of good food lately, but this was one of the best that I've had in a long time. The meat was very well seasoned and tender, the grains were good, and everything else that accompanied the dish was wonderful. The restaurant's customer service is exceptional as well. As soon as we walked in, my wife and I were treated like old friends and were quickly provided with a table. This was an amazing experience and one that I hope to have again. The food, ambiance, price, and service were exceptional and one that needs to be had by anyone visiting this area.

reviews.author: Shahrukh Afzal
reviews.text: Mezzes were just ok. Dolma seemed old and hard. Hummus was ok. The aubergine thing was a bit bitter. Rest were bad. In the mains we got the chefs plate which was just ordinary. Had some taste to it but wasnt outstanding as i would expect from a 4.6 starred spot. Maybe we should just have ordered a sandwich. Seemed like a popular dish here that everyone was getting.

reviews.author: Nash 86
reviews.text:
If you love kebabs, Berliner Das Original is a must-try. The food is delicious, fresh, and served in generous portions. The meat is tender and perfectly seasoned, with just the right amount of crispy edges. The toppings feel premium — from the creamy sauces to the crunchy vegetables, tangy pomegranate seeds, and rich feta.

Whether in a bowl or wrapped in fluffy bread, every bite is full of flavor. Even the fries are well-seasoned and go great with the dish.

Highly recommended for every kebab lover. 😋

reviews.author: Tom Appel
reviews.text: Thinking 4.5 was a good rating I went here as another option was closed. Disappointed. No ayran. No chili besides harissa. The ratio between salad, meat and dressing was off. A true kebab connoisseur would not like it here.

reviews.author: action inclusive
reviews.text: Wouah very good

reviews.author: Majda BH
reviews.text: Excellent

reviews.author: Karl Abi Chedid
reviews.text: Great and very original!

reviews.author: Amir Inbar
reviews.text:
We have eaten here twice (and that said a lot) - for lunch and for dinner next day.
Good food. Great Kebab!
The team is very welcoming and adjusted the dishes to our liking.
One of the best places to enjoy original, not industrial Humus :)

5 stars

reviews.author: Astrid Acosta Caly
reviews.text: Do you want to eat good food in Paris? You definitely have to come here! La Voie Lactée has the best food, service, and atmosphere for everyone! I'm more than happy to find this place and enjoy the food and culture of this beautiful city! Thank you to everybody who works here! I will see you soon 👌🏽

reviews.author: Javed Iqbal
reviews.text: If you are looking for true turkish taste of Donner Kebab and Shawarma this is the restaurant to look no further.  One of the best in town when it comes to serving food.  Fresh and tasty.  Love the turkish delight they offered us as a goodwill gesture.

reviews.author: Kaan
reviews.text: Not the best doner I have eaten during my trip. It was a little bit dry, the boulgour was not really tasty and overall it was not well seasoned. One good point is that they are generous on the amount in the plate.

reviews.author: Hosai
reviews.text: My husband liked his food but I didn't really like my food. I also didn't like the service. The young man that lured us in was super nice but the rest of the experience was so typical of being in a tourist trap. You are rushed through the ordering process and when I asked for extra hot sauce, I was pretty much yelled at by one of the men. I was willing to pay but I guess they get enough business they don't care. Eventually another person who seemed to be the most senior in this place threw in a pepper in my dish for me. It was my mistake for not trusting my gut to avoid this place....oh well, lesson learned.

name: GEMS KEBAB
address: 102 Rue du Faubourg Saint-Antoine, 75012 Paris, France

reviews.author: Cassidy Cooper
reviews.text:
SO GOOD. I was nervous because there weren’t many reviews yet, but thank goodness my friend has low blood sugar and we had to stop. I have a bad habit of starting with the fries… but these may be the best fries ever. Perfectly seasoned, and great sauces. We got a chicken & a vegetable falafel sandwich. A beautiful assortment of vegetables in the falafel one, which is rare for a vegetarian option. The chicken was warm and saucy, perfect hangover food. I suppose distance makes the heart grow fonder, and that distance is the millisecond between each bite. After each bite swallowed, I missed it. And then the next bite was even more delicious.
Have I convinced you yet? Super clean location, kind staff, and comfortable vibe.
I wonder how this will translate to French.
Enjoy!

reviews.author: Miri Mazor
reviews.text: Walked 25 mins from Accor arena specifically for this place. Very yummy, totally worth it. The kebab was crispy soft and juicy.

reviews.author: S Tran
reviews.text: Tip top

reviews.author: Anja Deelen
reviews.text: Great food, fresh ingredients, friendly personnel, quick service, fair price, I love it and definitely recommend it❤️

reviews.author: Daniel Maros
reviews.text:
Can a kebab Change the world? Probably not.  Can a kebab change your perception of it?  I think this one can.  Came here on a whim after missing my dinner reservations.

To even put this in the same ballpark as all the other kebabs and berliners I’ve had would be doing it a disservice.   Perfection across the board.  Not one part of the Berliner was lacking.  Bread, veggies, meat, sauce, fries all transcendent.  I will miss this more than most things in Paris.

Thank you for your service to food 🫡

I didn’t take any photos i ate it too fast.

reviews.author: Saravanan Setty
reviews.text: Got chicken doner and the chicken was really well done! The spicy sauce also had some good kick to it. Doner could use some more moistness with sauces and was a bit dry but not sure if more of the norm in France.

reviews.author: M.M. R.
reviews.text: Excellent kebabs, plates and service - not much more to say. Lamb was seasoned and cooked perfectly. Great location.

reviews.author: Isabel Jia
reviews.text: Best kebab I’ve ever had hands down! The plate was beautifully plated and the kebab was smoky and super flavorful! For €17, you got a big plate with meat, vegetables and lentil, such a good value !The cafe itself is really cute inside and outside, giving classic French bistro vibes. The lady works there is super friendly and attentive. Would 100% recommend!

reviews.author: Clémence Ailhaud
reviews.text: I asked for a vegan sandwich as it was on the menu I thought they would know what jt means, but not they put cheese in it so I couldn’t eat it. Good thing I saw it before I ate. Imagine being allergic to milk, eat vegan on purpose thinking it’s safe, and in the end almost eat something you should not be eating. I should of unwrap it before leaving but again if you put something in your menu you should know what it is.

reviews.author: Alex Tran
reviews.text: Got the plate with a mix of meats.. hands down one of the best meals in Paris so far !!

reviews.author: Asma AlShimmari
reviews.text: Very delicious crepe I had at the beautiful corner in the town. I enjoyed having banana with chocolate crepe. Enjoyed having this beautiful dessert while walking around this peaceful town. Tasty and Recommended .

reviews.author: Ellh Zx
reviews.text:
5 girls, 2 of us vegetarian. They treated us so well. Very nice people, very good quality of the food and very generous portion of the food. Very good prices. 100% recommend!

Vegetarian friendly the picture is our special order bread with sause potatoes salads mushrooms ❤️❤️❤️

reviews.author: Nate Findley
reviews.text: Rating as a street food stand, good, well priced and actually good presentation !

reviews.author: Sébastien Daniel
reviews.text:
Good experience with quick service. The dish was hot and tasty. Good value for money.
Best experience with take away. Tables are a bit small for several people.

reviews.author: Jill Hunter
reviews.text: So disappointing, didn’t get what I asked for and the meat had no flavor.

name: Casse Croute Grec
address: 4 Rue de l'École Polytechnique, 75005 Paris, France

reviews.author: Dylan Filkins
reviews.text:
✨️Maybe their kebab is better, but falafel is premade and frozen, so go elsewhere for it. ✨️

You are met with an old timer who works at his own pace. Which creates a line that takes some 10 to 15 minutes to get through. Which isn't too bad.

The inside portion is quite small, so don't expect to really sit down. They have more or less bar seating, and you can stand, but the concept is more so to have takeaway.

With so many awards, I expect the falafel to also be handmade or worth of praise. Sadly, it is a cheaper alternative and isn't made by hand. So, as you can expect, the flavour isn't the best. So I'd recommend my vegetarian friends to look for a different place. In a pinch, it does well, but you can have better.

reviews.author: AlanaSophia
reviews.text: Good meat, small seating area, very dry gyro. Good but very dry, not enough sauce at all. The guy making them was very stingy with the toppings, putting one piece of tomatoe on it by default. Otherwise decent quality.

reviews.author: Jeremías Padilla
reviews.text: Very authentic kebab with warm service. You can really tell there’s care into the preparation of each meal where the ingredients are fresh and the dish is made right in front of you.

reviews.author: Brady Everett
reviews.text: Great food, great price for Paris

reviews.author: Marcus Hong
reviews.text: I had high hopes for this kebab store, but sadly, it fell short of expectations. The meat was dry and tasted like it had been sitting out for hours. The tabouli lacked freshness. To make matters worse, the pita bread was stale and chewy. Overall, it was a forgettable and unsatisfying meal. Save your money and find another place for your kebab fix.

reviews.author: Lidyana Chintya
reviews.text: Halal and delicious food. In front of metro. Excellent service

reviews.author: Tomas Birkhofer
reviews.text: Great Kebab place with amazing service!!

reviews.author: cynthia
reviews.text: Staff is super friendly and their food is simply delicious.

reviews.author: Uzair Godhy
reviews.text: Imran gave us amazing service and the chicken shawarmas were really good.

reviews.author: Muhib Mansuri
reviews.text: Not sure about the other reviews but this was incredible! The sandwich I ordered was loaded with chicken and full of flavor... Yes it was fully cooked. The service was what took this to the next level, the owners are extremely nice and caring. 10/10 would recommend for a quick, filling meal

reviews.author: dido mido
reviews.text: I took doner, I would say it's a regular kebab nothing special about it. I'm not sure if the price is worth it (a little bit more expensive then regular one). The service is good.

reviews.author: Maria Hanano
reviews.text: One of the best doner I have tried in Paris. The food was very good, bread was fresh, generous amount of chicken that is well seasoned accompanied by good sauces. Reasonably priced, very clean restaurant, and very friendly staff. Highly recommend, would eat here again 100%.

reviews.author: Mark Gurney
reviews.text: Extremely good. I was in Istanbul this afternoon this doner wins hands down. Efes draft is a winner.

reviews.author: Siham Arma
reviews.text: Nice food, fresh clean and tasty. Friendly staff, very correct. Highly recommand thus place.

reviews.author: April Llamas
reviews.text: We took the Klasik on the menu. It was big and flavorful! Good enough for its price. Though they have very limited choices for the sauce ☹️

reviews.author: Inna Koalka
reviews.text: This was an incredible kebab! They bake their own kebab flatbreads, and the meat is tender, cooked over a fire. There was so much meat in the filling that you had to hold the kebab with both hands 😁. We were really hungry, but we could only eat half and took the rest home. We couldn't leave such a delicacy behind 😅. My teenage son said it was the most delicious place we've had in our entire trip to Paris 😋.

reviews.author: Faz Perso
reviews.text: Good but where is the meat !? Even it's a bit expensive for that kind of kebab.. service is really slow. Ok for a quick meal

reviews.author: Fuat Bakisli
reviews.text: Exceptional food, outstanding staff, and a delightful experience overall. After three days in Paris, we’re so glad we stopped here—a perfect way to end a wonderful day in the city! ❤️

reviews.author: Gabriel Farina
reviews.text:
Can't recommend this enough. Just perfect, a pure gem. Everything was really, really delicious. It's a family restaurant and they are all very nice and service is top notch. Well done to you all!

I came with my family (4 people), we ordered basic everything on the menu – which is short but it fits perfectly every taste –, and I unintentionally had one of the best food experiences in Paris. The 'pizza fine' starter is so good, and the beef grilled on coal is heavenly and you can taste the smoke when eating. Delicious. Desert is also amazing, Kunefe was the best! To finish, a true Turkish coffee, strong, dark and tasteful as it should be. If you are in the area and not sure what to eat, here's a safe, surprising and unforgettable place to go.

reviews.author: Galip Karakiliç
reviews.text: Great place, good quality and fresh meat. You can eat here traditional meals. Prices are affordable here. After dinner I ate baklava and drunk some tea with it also. If you come to Paris then it’s worth to visit this place.

name: LÜKS Kebab Paris 13
address: 6 Rue du Père Guérin, 75013 Paris, France

reviews.author: Ewa Gronkowska
reviews.text: Absolutely delicious veggie kebab — full of flavour and perfectly cooked! The curly fries were yummy, mozzarella sticks were great, and the jalapeño bites had just the right amount of spice. Huge portions all around. The tiramisu dessert was lovely too — a perfect finish to a fantastic meal!

reviews.author: Sara Sam
reviews.text:
We liked the meal as it consisted of rice😂
It’s good and near IKEA . The staff are kind and supportive. There is an order machine for those who cannot speak French.

reviews.author: Young Foczka
reviews.text:
it was cold at the top and there wasn't much flavor if anything a little spicy and  a odd hint from chicken. it was kinda falling apart also.
would not come again and will not recommend to anyone.

reviews.author: Brune Medeiros
reviews.text: I want to win the lottery and give all my money to the chef. Simply DELICIOUS. I'm talking about sounds like HMMMMM and OHHH YES that I would only make between closed doors. DELICIOUS kebab. Burrata on the perfect temperature as well. The fries are big and crunchy, freaking love it

reviews.author: Sherman Oh
reviews.text: This shop serves very nice kebab! The staff are all very friendly and helpful. There were 3 of us sharing 2 portions of food and the staff even bring an extra plate for us. So kind of him! Food portion is very huge also.

reviews.author: Sarah Guzman
reviews.text: The food is really good.  We got the kebab wrap with fries.

reviews.author: Danika Koenig
reviews.text: This place was around the corner from our hotel. 5/5 kebab with frites, reminded me of what I used to eat as an exchange student in college. We also got the cheese pizza and it was reliably delicious. Said the owner gave us the best service and we finished the meal with mint tea and full bellies. This is a must dine on the run.

reviews.author: Abdullah Shoaib
reviews.text:
Very good kebab with excellent service. The staff were friendly and welcoming, which made the experience even better.
The quality of the food was great, especially for the price.
It’s a nice place for tourists to enjoy a tasty meal at reasonable prices.

reviews.author: _ AndrewZ_
reviews.text: Unfortunately, the place does not really live up to its name. The interior and overall presentation leave much to be desired. The meat was quite tough, and the kebab itself was very different from what is shown in the photos. In reality, the portion was about three times smaller than advertised, which feels misleading for customers.

reviews.author: Youssef Ben Amara
reviews.text:
I highly reccomand this,
Big thanks to Said for the warm welcome and tea!

reviews.author: Tanzila Hasan Pinky
reviews.text:
The food is very nice and tasty.
The staff behaviour is also very polite.
Mostly liked thing about this place is they serve such a nice way of water, a bottle full of mint leaves and serve the glass with ice.Its a very kind and nice gesture in this summer day.Even the place is not full of people.
We took two kebabs, cost 7.50€ each,more then enough for a single person.
The w/c was also nicely clean.

I would recommend it to everyone looking for fresh nice kebabs.

reviews.author: T J
reviews.text: Amazing kebab place! They are open at night. The staff were extremely nice and helpful. The kebab tastes really good and the price is fair. Just the best of the best experience!

reviews.author: Megan Elizabeth
reviews.text: Best kebab I’ve ever had! So friendly and amazing free tea too. Stop here for a bite, you won’t regret it. Perfect hangover food for New Year’s Day, I feel amazing now! Thank you

reviews.author: Denys Buryi
reviews.text: It brought me joy to be in this place. Delicious tea, delicious food and the dishes are giant. The owners are the sweetest people, you just want to hug them. I will come here every time I travel though Paris .

reviews.author: Patryk Perkowski
reviews.text: Sooo delicious! Fresh and tasty. Really big serving. Staff was so nice and caring. Definitely recommend 👌

reviews.author: Nicole Pol
reviews.text: I used to go to this place a lot while staying in Paris! The food is fresh, homemade and soo tasty! Very friendly staff, nice interior and big choice of drinks. The best part is it's very affordable, one of the best prices among other kebab places! Unfortunately, I'm no longer in Paris, but if I will ever be back there - I will for sure pay a visit to this place! Definitely recommend! Merci ❤️

reviews.author: Lin KANE
reviews.text: I can see the chef manage the environment very often during all of my dinner periods. And the kebab is the real meat and not too salty. Clean environment.

reviews.author: Marvik Ange
reviews.text: OMG!!!... it was super good. The food was just EXCELLENT - fresh, juicy, yummmmy... Friendly staff & nicest owner.. the price for this quality is amazing. Will come back here more often from now on! I DO recommend

reviews.author: A Z
reviews.text:
The first time we came to this place the young guy who was there was extremely nice respectful and polite. He prepared the food meticulously and asked us what we wanted in it and how we wanted it. We went back today and the older guy who was there was completely the opposite. Oh my God, he was so rude and grumpy. He prepared the food while complaining and without asking how we wanted it.
We came to Paris for a few days and even though the food was excellent the first time but we will never go back there.

reviews.author: Joe Hutson
reviews.text: Really nice kebab-type place. The man who served me was very kind and helpful in selecting a dish. The food was freshly prepared and the plate was huge for a low price. The chicken, bread, salad, rice, was all great! They have a bit of outdoor seating as well.

reviews.author: Eseniya Redko
reviews.text:
Definetely the best kebab I have tried in Paris ,
Super fresh & juicy meat , and what’s more important- the bread that they make by themselves as I am really tired of those rubber wraps that are offered in normal kebab shops😭. They have quite a few options and I tried the Lebanese kebab and their fries were absolutely delicious. Everything super fresh , the sauces and the meat are not greasy so you don’t feel very guilty or heavy after. Will be my go to Kebab shop for sure !

reviews.author: Sam Botbol
reviews.text:
This new kebab restaurant is a fantastic addition to the neighborhood. Had heard about their other shop in Montmartre so naturally came to try out their new spot rue d’Assas.

The food is fresh, the service friendly and the shop superbly designed. Be ready to pay slightly more than your average parisian kebab, but definitely worth it for fresh and home made food. And don’t sleep on the side of fried chicken! great way to top off your lunch on hungry day.

reviews.author: Paula Blanco Hernandez
reviews.text:
Probably the best kebab I have ever eaten.
The fried arrived cold, but because the delivery took aprox 20min, not their fault.
The white sauce has a hint of mint that gives a nice freshness. The kebab didn’t have any sauce inside tho, but the meat was really good seasoned and the wrap itself was also delicious. Definitely a great to place to stop by or order a meal from!

reviews.author: Oscar M
reviews.text: One of the best kebabs I have ever tried. Insane quality and flavor. 100% recommended in Paris

reviews.author: Estee Jaillon
reviews.text: Best kebab shop in paris !!!

reviews.author: S
reviews.text:
Huge and flavourful Berliner kebab. Great portion size for the price.
Not too many seats available, but it works. Quick service too.

reviews.author: Isabel Cuffari
reviews.text: Let me tell you, this was the best food I have ever eaten in my life. I ordered the Halloumi en menu and other than all of this HUGE combo being 10€, it was so delicious. I ate my entire meal. Me and my friends also recieved complimentary espresso’s and were offered to play the music we wanted on the speakers.

reviews.author: Marcell Filyo
reviews.text: Great kebab with generous portions and delicious flavors! The meat was juicy, the vegetables were fresh, and everything was well seasoned. Fast service and very friendly staff. Definitely a place worth coming back to!

reviews.author: Mahfuz Rahman
reviews.text: We had a language barrier but the people who worked there helped us a lot to understand. Customer service were top notch and foods were delicious. Keep up the good work!

reviews.author: Metugui Badr
reviews.text: Amazing food and great service! One of the best dining experiences I've had in a long time. Highly recommended!

reviews.author: Sara Sam
reviews.text:
The kebab was fresh but I didn’t like the taste. The seasoning was not ok for me. The service was nothing special , the french fries was ok. No toilet, no place for washing your hands either. And it was pricey in comparison to other similar options.
Never go again!

reviews.author: M Ahmed Riad
reviews.text:
Didn't know fruits can make such an amazing combination with meat.
The taste?
Just wow.

reviews.author: Mehran I
reviews.text: Amazing little Döner shop in the district. Ordered the Meister beef with fries and falafel as the side. The fries were crispy and well seasoned. The falafel was OK. The döner was amazing and the bread even more amazing. Highly recommended indeed. Simple menu and delicious. Great service and attentive. No restrooms. Will come again

reviews.author: Martin Bergström
reviews.text:
Just like home in Sweden - Skövde (The sauce and the meet is on an other level)
Fresh, tasty and also a lovely service.

reviews.author: Steven Seeley
reviews.text: Damn good kebabs and a friendly counter service. The atmosphere is good for the type of establishment that it is with sidewalk seating and people watching as dinner accompaniments.

name: Restaurant La Paix - Spécialités Turques & Grillades (FAIT MAISON)

reviews.author: KH S
reviews.text: 맛있어요~ 밥 들어간 요리 드시고 싶으시면 추천합니다 The staff was so kind even though I did not speak French very well. The food was fantastic, delivered very quickly (less than 5 min). Bread on the side was served warm, went nicely with the meat and vegetables in the kebab dish. I was offered a glass for the plastic bottle of water I had been carrying around. Would rate 10 stars but Google only allows 5 ;)

reviews.author: Sherwin Garcia-Obregon (sherwino)
reviews.text: 😋 delicious. Kebabs, and other freshly cooked meats packed into savery and soft bread that I'm still thinking about. Had it with some chai tea and it got us ready for our next adventure. Very close to the street market in Montparnasse near theater district.

reviews.author: saeed moammeri
reviews.text: The food was really good and we enjoyed it. However, the staff could have been a bit friendlier. It almost felt like they weren’t very happy that we came to the restaurant to eat, which made the atmosphere less welcoming. A warmer attitude would have made the experience much better.

reviews.author: joseph russo
reviews.text: The only criticism I can make is that the service was a little slow and the place looked like a late night greasy spoon. Everything else was pretty good. The food was delicious and cheap. I got one of the more expensive menus items at €13.50 and it was very good. People with me got cheaper kebabs and they were a little disappointed. I feel a little unfair hiving a 3 Star raging but compared to kebabs and Turkish food I’ve had elsewhere it was a little sub par

reviews.author: H Hafidzi
reviews.text: Great and delicious kebab (doner) plate that i had. One of a few halal food can be found near to Pullman Hotel and Mercure Hotel. All other type of food nearby. This restaurant served halal food. Clean and pleasant atmosphere. Friendly staffs who welcomed us with smiles. Its normal for French peoples, although he is not a local. Thank you for serving us a great dinner for us.

reviews.author: Alina C.
reviews.text:
Nice place , food was good and fresh ! Welcoming staff
Thank you

reviews.author: Joe Brouillard
reviews.text: I stumbled upon Friends Burger yesterday and visited this fast food restaurant again today. For such a small business they have a rather large menu. They serve burgers, hot dogs, pizzas, tacos, kebabs and so much more. Yesterday I had a lamb kebab and today pizza; both were very good. The staff is friendly and they do speak English. If you are in the neighborhood stop in!

reviews.author: VP
reviews.text: A shop with many choices of fast food (kebab/ burger/ bowl) to grab before enjoying a walk at Luxembourg Garden.
