reviews.author: Sanskar Vaghani
reviews.text: One of the best food places for me; I'm eating their kebab every week. Good food and great service.

reviews.author: Melanie Parker-Evans
reviews.text: We stumbled across this gem on Bastille day when everywhere was closed in the area. Great service and pastries with fresh juice. After a busy day sightseeing, we wanted something easy, close and economical. Our kebabs, chips and burgers were exceptional. Highly recommend.

name: Baba Bey
address: 55 Bis Bd du Montparnasse, 75006 Paris, France

reviews.author: Madeline Kuhl
reviews.text: Baba Bey is one of my favorites! Such great food - and a great location and hours for late night bites after bar hopping in Paris. My favorite is the chicken makloub with blanche & samourai sauce. Absolutely delicious.

reviews.author: Permatasari Pratiwi
reviews.text: One of the halal food places I found did not disappoint! their food is delicious, and the menu has a lot of variety. The only downside is that you can't stay and eat there for long.

reviews.author: Rishad A.R
reviews.text:
I’d recommend them for late night dinner. Most of the kitchens nearby have already been closed while this one was buzzing with people.

There was a long queue. I can remember we waited for almost 15+ mins in the queue to order food and another 15+ mins to get it. The person who took the order were patient enough to explain the dishes to us.

Limited seats indoor and while we visited, it was full outdoor.

reviews.author: Wewy J
reviews.text: It was super busy, food was Good but if you don’t like spicy food you should tell them to remove the chilly from the food, as it is very spicy. Customer service was below average, we had to ask couple of time to get our request.

reviews.author: Luigi
reviews.text: Had a wonderful mixed kebab tray. Would definitely recommend, food was so nice after going to a different restaurant prior and being very unhappy with the food.

reviews.author: Nils Nerger
reviews.text: The food was amazing, but it took very long for us to get it. I’m used to ordering my kebab and immediately getting it, but we waited over 20 minutes for our food, while customers that came after us had been served immediately. Food tasted great tho.

reviews.author: Bargo Yousif
reviews.text: Acceptable to grab a quick mediterranean snack. The owner is friendly and helpful. His attitude is far better than the taste, but it's a good and not-expensive place.

reviews.author: Nicholas Hudson Bodsworth
reviews.text: My friends tell me this is one of the best kebab places in town. Unfortunately as a vegetarian it is difficult for me to verify that claim. What I can say is that they serve a fantastic falafel wrap and I appreciate that.

reviews.author: Kevin McGuinness
reviews.text: Good food, but Jesus Christ, the guy took 20 minutes to make a kebab. If he’d let me I would’ve just made it myself...

reviews.author: Marc Ngo
reviews.text: Decent kebab, don't expect quality not quantity. Just does the job of filling your stomach

reviews.author: Josiah
reviews.text: Very good. It was so good and the service is great and they are very nice. I love this place and they open late.

reviews.author: N Ahamed
reviews.text:
Owned by the loveliest of men, these gentleman greet you with a smile, with Bonjours to everyone who walks past. The pricing was fair, and the food was tasty!

The shop was kept incredibly clean and it was a nice establishment after a long day of walking around Paris, it was exactly what we needed.

My wife had a chicken sandwich, and I had the beef sandwich. Both were great.

reviews.author: Ožbe Pečar
reviews.text: Good food and friendly stuff. Clean and nice, near Eiffel tower.

reviews.author: Shahid Gaglani
reviews.text: Excellent food, great service and tastes super exclusive. Highly recommended Halal place in Paris

reviews.author: Abdikafi Osman
reviews.text: They are good people and i like the food they have, thank you so much guys🫡

reviews.author: Manwell Dos
reviews.text:
Kind staff and you can order your meal on digital screens. The vegan sandwich were tasty but, the fries were served cold with a ordinary refrigerant.

The place were so gloomy and dirty that the tables glued. Also no table service and very uncomfortable chairs.

At the end I think it's a overpriced place with a bad service and very inconfortable, don't justify the price you pay.

reviews.author: Marouen
reviews.text:
Tasty Kebab, different experience.

Clean place, cool staff. Digital screens to order your meal. It did a little bit a while to prepare the order, i think they had deliveries getting prepared at the same time.

The menu also should be reworked maybe, a little bit confusing.

Liked the Bowl concept, will be back definitely.

Btw, it’s Halal even it’s not mentioned anywhere.

reviews.author: Paul Brothe
reviews.text: If you have had Döner in Germany you will like this place. Even though it is fast food it tastes good. The staff is friendly and the prices are good. You order from a computerized menu system. There is a dining space upstairs.

reviews.author: Rex
reviews.text: Both wraps were fantastic and staff were super friendly 👌 would definitely recommend.

reviews.author: Azad bin Amzad
reviews.text: very good quality kebab.neat and clean with amazing service

reviews.author: Fatma Sayed
reviews.text:
Oily food, horrible taste.
But good service from the staff.

reviews.author: Muhammad Adil
reviews.text: The chicken wrap was full of chips with very little chicken and tasted so bland. The beef burger was below average. The chicken burger was average. A stingy amount of sauce was given with every order. The staff person taking orders was very unfriendly and unhelpful. Overall extremely poor experience.

reviews.author: Lulu pearl
reviews.text:
The nearst halal food in the  area (near the efful tower Paris  ) , the price is the average just like any other halal or Turkish restaurant , you can definitely stop and eat if you are hungry , or  you want to eat halal food , we ordered shawarma , and fries , with Algerian sauce 👌, the sandwich was okay , not the best shawarma , it's more like kebab  sandwich, but it's fine , the fries was crispy , and delicious 😋 , good amount too ,
, I couldn't finish my food , so I took it to go 😊 ..

I wished if I saw a smile on the faces of the workers there .. the environment wasn't so lovely to be honest , and my table wasn't clean when I sat down ..
Maybe I came in a busy  , or hard day for the people there
I wish them all  the best , and hopefully they take the review as a positive reinforcement ..
I will definitely vist again , and I will right my second experience if there is any updates
thanks 😊
Update:
I went there for Eid , had a pizza , it was really delicious 😋, the dough was fluffy , but yet crispy , the cheese was amazing 😍 for good price too ..

I recommend 👍😋..

reviews.author: Zuraini Zakaria
reviews.text: Looking Halal food at Paris. I ordered Kebab Samourei.. n they gave me green chillies.. lega... dpt kunyah menda pedas

reviews.author: Mohammed Saad Mirza
reviews.text: Perfect place for quick meals! The shawarma is Tasty. I tasted the chicken sandwich too and it’s good! They are Arabs and they serve Halal Food!

reviews.author: ouaisse lebdiri
reviews.text: The best kebab in paris without joinking, keep going

reviews.author: Sury Y
reviews.text:
The worst kebab place ever. I ordered a taco and chicken sandwich. They were so dry and I could just tell the meat was not good. Although i was extremely hungry, I couldn't finish half of the food. I don't want to say I "ate" their food. It's better to say I "pushed" the food into my stomach.
최악이다. 이태원이 그립다.

reviews.author: Simran Boparai
reviews.text: AMAZING AMAZING FOOD!!!! If I went based on previous reviews I would not have gone however we happened to walk in as we are walking by as we were very hungry after our tour and a lot of places were closed. This place blew our whole families expectations. We got the kebab and steak and the kebab was the softest meat I have ever had and I have travelled a lot and tried many varieties. 100% recommend , please try. Definitely soul food and not to mention the beyond reasonable prices for the portion size.

reviews.author: Nilay Y
reviews.text: The place was dirty, the plates too. The photos you can see are not representative of what you can get there. Somehow as a customer you cannot use the toilets and cannot pay by card. Weird isn’t it ? And I’m not even talking about the food, it’s not worth it. I assure you, you would prefer pay 5€ more for something good in an another place. Unfortunately I forgot to take photos, I was so pissed of that I could not think properly.

reviews.author: Tassio Marques
reviews.text: Great kebab, amazing meat. Don’t ask for the spicy one if you can’t handle or maybe ask for mild. Id say im good with spice and that was close to my limit. Amazing nonetheless.

reviews.author: Haydee b. Lopez
reviews.text:
TOUR FOOD is such a great spot, perfectly located right in front of Hôtel La Comtesse Tour Eiffel, which makes it super convenient and easy to find.

The food is really good and full of flavor, and the customer service makes the experience even better. The employees are welcoming, kind, and always greet you with a nice smile.

The kebab is so delicious, especially with the jalapeño fries—absolutely amazing. The steak sandwich is great too, juicy and satisfying, served with crispy fries.

If you’re staying at Hôtel La Comtesse or walking near the Eiffel Tower and want tasty food with great service, TOUR FOOD is a must-try. Highly recommended! 👌🥙🍟✨

reviews.author: Warangkana Teerasakdakul
reviews.text:
Very tasty and very big portions.worth the money.
Love to food and the owner is very friendly

reviews.author: Tupuivao Wilson
reviews.text: Very small hole in the wall with great food, great portion sizes and great prices. Luckily my hotel was just across the street. Stopped in and had the kebab wrap. Amazing!!! Will be back for sure.. and they are open till 2am.

reviews.author: Z Denno
reviews.text: If you want a place near the Eiffel Tower that does cheap fast food, this is it. It’s such a lovely little place and the staff are very friendly (they do speak English but I do advise speaking in French first to be polite). There are outdoor and indoor seating options and loads of food options, including vegetarian options which is a bit of a rarity here. I’ve been a couple of times and it’s a really good spot.

reviews.author: Alexandra Verbuncu
reviews.text: Very good food. Very nice guys serving you. Easy to communicate with for tourists - good English. Lost my charger there, came back the next day and got it back. Had a lovely time there.

reviews.author: Asianfoodninja
reviews.text:
One of the best kebabs in Paris, well a really good whatever you call it (plate I ordered).

A plate of two meats, salad, chips, rice and freshly baked bread, with a drink is only €13.50.

Great customer service, one of the staff jokingly said "Don't pay now, if it's not good we don't charge"

Food came out for 12mins as I was dining in, the place was full and a constant food delivery pick up was noticed.

The food was tasty and freshly made, The meat choice was the kebab chicken and beef kofta.

Overall a satisfying meal and plentiful. Great place and bonus they open late.

reviews.author: Melissa Sharpe
reviews.text: Very friendly and helpful staff. Made recommendations and helped us interpret the menu in English so we could understand it. Very much appreciated that!  Had a chicken panini, chicken pizza and mozz sticks. Can’t beat the price, food was hot and all very good! Would definitely go back!

reviews.author: Mario Albota
reviews.text:
Excellent, best kebab ever!
Very kind people will serve you with a smile on their faces, you will not be disappointed, an excellent taste with a wide variety of options to choose from, by far one of the best kebabs I have ever eaten.
Totally recommend my experience!

reviews.author: touseef zaki
reviews.text: I stumbled upon this shop while walking by the street. I tried for the first time but the taste was Soo good that i want to try out again. Staffs are very polite and courteous. Highly recommend if you are near Sigor area.

reviews.author: Galia M
reviews.text: Probaly the best kebab place in the area. The quality of ingredients is good, everything looks fresh and the staff is friendly. The only downside for me is that the staff works without gloves (but unfortunately that's the case in most of kebabs in Paris).

reviews.author: Jack Yan
reviews.text:
So Good is a conveniently located restaurant near the metro station.

When my wife and I dined there, the two chefs who also served as waitstaff were extremely friendly. Frankly, I find that the minority communities in Paris tend to be more hospitable and willing to communicate in simple English with us.

We ordered a So Good pizza and a portion of fries. Initially, we were worried it wouldn't be enough, but the staff explained that it was a serving for two people and that ordering more would be wasteful. We were glad we took their advice.

The pizza was delicious and freshly made by the staff, and the portion of fries was very generous. The accompanying spicy sauce was flavorful without being too hot for Asian tastes.

The total bill came to €14, making this the best value meal we've had in France, with great taste and exceptionally friendly service.

Highly recommend!

reviews.author: James
reviews.text: Our go to Kebab and burger spot while staying nearby! Lots of orders, in the morning a new kebab meat was put out but by the time we ate there at night it was already very thin. Would recommend!

reviews.author: Wendy Geraldine
reviews.text:
Huge portion for very affordable price. Generous amount of meat. One serve is more than enough for two people.
The chips was freshly done before us and the kebab was hot. Taste good but a little on the salty side for me (husband found it good). I like the sauce in the chips (i think that may be something with cheese but not sure - it was good). Staff was friendly ☺️
If you are in the surrounding, i would recommend.

reviews.author: Marta Pawlak
reviews.text: I never wrote any review about food but this place is unique. If you are a fan of kebabs this is necessary in Paris. This portion was insane big for only 8€. Both souses were amazing especially I love the spicy one. The meat here plays main role. They are making this meat themselves. It’s super juicy and well seasoned. Food is the most important but the atmosphere there and the service stold my heart. Big recommendation! Such a solid food!

reviews.author: Sushma Alla
reviews.text: This place was such a gem. Fries were so tasty we craved for them after. The place is so humble and serves fresh tasty food for such a cheap price in Paris. Don’t expect a fancy place but the service was great.

reviews.author: Harley M
reviews.text: I just had an amazing lunch here! This place is pretty casual with tons of locals here that are stopping by for lunch. We got a plate with veal kebab (13.50) and a hummus plate with lamb skewers (19). It felt like a splurge for the lamb skewers plate, but the lamb was really tasty - not gamey at all! Both the plates were got had huge portions - we could not finish our meals! Sandwiches are 8-10 and looked sizable as well. We got a baklava with Turkish ice cream for dessert as well! All delicious. A great meal in the champs elysees area.

reviews.author: Dgoth
reviews.text:
Went there on my first trip to paris, and honestly the food was really great! The place was very cozy and nice too.

The staff who greeted us was so friendly. Would come again next time! Worth the visit.

reviews.author: verisure
reviews.text: Very good and delicious food and it came fast. We had to wait for like 10-15 minutes to get in the restaurant, since it was very full. Inside it was very full also, and that’s why there was a lot of noice, but it’s understandable. Most of the workers were very nice and polite, but one girl was kinda rude towards us. I would recommend, since the food was amazing and affordable! ☺️

reviews.author: Ozcan E
reviews.text: The food was AMAZING, really nice ambiance and food service. Quite crowded as it seems to be really popular and had limited spaces. It gets a bit stuffy and loud but the food is really worth it. The prices are quite good, especially for the heart of Paris. Thank you for your hospitality, I don’t have any solid negative thing to say. The halal certificate on the door is really welcoming!

reviews.author: Zain ul Abbas
reviews.text: Just Okay, Nothing tasty in the menu but fresh and served quick. The restaurant stays busy and that attracts more people thinking they have taste. Not even a single item is close in taste to the Turkish, the one thing worth trying is the Adana kebab only. If you are hungry and around, try it once but you won’t feel happy or satisfied at all. Prices are fine, place is small. I will not eat here again, not worth a repeat.

name: Croc Nivert
address: 8 Rue de la Croix Nivert, 75015 Paris, France

reviews.author: Issam Riziq
reviews.text:
Good staff, good portion, lot's of variety.
Price is good.
Definitely i will come.
I'm talking about a budget food not fine restaurant.

reviews.author: Rio Haryokusumo
reviews.text: Best bang for your buck in Paris so far, this meal is huge, trust me it's way bigger than the photos. The whole thing only cost 10 euros!!! The salad was fresh, the meat was juicy and its got a nice flavor. The fries were OK but hey its not the star of the dish.

reviews.author: Samara B
reviews.text: Ordered a chicken burger comes with fries they tasted really fresh, my husband ordered a falafel sandwich comes with fries as well he said it was tasty. Prices are very reasonable.

reviews.author: J
reviews.text: We found this nice little gem because it was one of the few places in the area still selling food after midnight on a Thursday/early Friday morning - very reasonably priced - there was a friendly man taking the orders (might have been the owner) - The plate shown in the picture was definitely worth 10€ and was very flavorful. Also try the 7up mojito soda (especially if you aren’t from France) - it’s delicious!

reviews.author: Mustapha Benhalima
reviews.text:
Nice fast food restaurants, the food was tasty and halal, and the prices were correct regarding that it's situated in the 15th arrondissement.
The staff are nice and welcoming

reviews.author: Ariadne Coble
reviews.text: I’ve tried many kebabs around europe and this one I can say can be in my top 3. Fresh and sabory bread for the kebab, the meat was on point and actually hot ( which I appreciate) fries also on point. What a great spot near Eiffel tower for a quick pits stop for street food. Definetly recommended

reviews.author: Faisal Abbas
reviews.text: Tried the chicken doner wrap which was average. Smash burger was better. Chicken burger was average as it was made with processed patty. Good thing it’s halal and open till late. Staff is very considerate and kind.

reviews.author: Eran Legon
reviews.text: First time I’ve ever left a review on a fast food restaurant, so this is completely genuine. Hands down the best kebab spot in paris, delicious food and clean interior design, although it was quite expensive I will be coming back if I ever have the chance to.

reviews.author: Leonie R
reviews.text: Awesome tartar in different variations, nice staff and high quality food! You can have it in a roll or with fries! I had the saumon with fries - definitely coming back here to try them all!

reviews.author: Emilia Prinzessin
reviews.text: Worst food I had in a long time. Fries were dry, Mozzarella sticks were plain and with no flavour at all, I didn't get my burger, sandwich was plain and dry, not enough sauce or salad, the only good thing was the coke. Also made us pay more than it was worth, so ripped us off. Can not recomment.

reviews.author: Jamie
reviews.text:
Delicious food! The staff was so helpful with our questions and attentive even after food arrived. We had a chicken kebab plate and a mixed grill plate and both came with meat, pita bread, salad, grilled veggies and two choices of sauce.
Everything was made fresh and there is a small dining area protected from the weather to eat.
Reasonable priced for Paris. We will return!

reviews.author: Syed Riad
reviews.text: Food was very good quality and the staff was very welcoming and friendly.see you next.If you want original Turkish food ,I will say “one sentence”Come here.

reviews.author: Jasim Uddin
reviews.text:
Best Kebab In the city of saint lazare.
Service was very quick and the team was  excellent.

reviews.author: Rian Gonzales
reviews.text: Believe me when i say i surveyed a couple of kebab shops within the perimeter and this was the best one by a mile. The kebab was ok, not mind-blowing or anything but the place is kept cleaner than a usual fast food shop. The service was absolutely delightful and if you opt to eat al fresco, you can go eat with your dogs 💖 since the store was close to closing when we ate, we were given an extra baklava on the house. 💖 Happy to have stumbled in this quaint little resto

reviews.author: Arbaz Shaikh
reviews.text:
Good Kebab and Banger Music!!

Came out of Gare Saint Lazare on a rainy day, really hungry and found this great place!

Amjad greeted at the counter and helped me with selection on the menu and suggested the Doner Kebab Wrap with chips and drink.

Chicken was juicy, salad was fresh and crunchy and their sauces are fresh and homemade with no overpowering vinegar taste or smell!

Finished the food within 5 minutes but I kept on vibing with the music for couple of hours, banger playlist consisting of Sean Paul, 50 Cent, Enrique, Akon, Chris Brown, Jay Sean, J Balvin, Drake, DJ Snake, Jason Derulo and I can keep on going.

At the end they offered me complimentary baklava and turkish chai.

Will strongly suggest this place.

reviews.author: Landon Matsuda-Vizcarra (MadLand Creations)
reviews.text: This place was OUTSTANDING! To be honest it was one of the best things i have ever eaten! The food is fresh and you can definitely taste it! The workers were friendly and spoke English to help us decide what to get. This place is kind of hidden on a street but it needs to be front and center to get as much attention as possible!

reviews.author: Ruveyda Aydin
reviews.text:
I ate at a döner place, and it was truly a pleasant surprise. The meat in the döner was perfectly cooked, everything was fresh and made with care. Especially the green sauce it’s homemade and absolutely delicious! They also serve biber közlenmiş (which means roasted peppers in Turkish), adding a special touch to the whole meal.
Despite the generous portions, I felt pleasantly full but not stuffed just right. The staff were warm and friendly. Although I enjoy many German döner places, this one has now become my absolute favorite!

reviews.author: Ömer Arin
reviews.text: As someone from Turkey, I have been a regular client of Paris - Berlin. They offer one of the most delicious kebabs and the team is lovely and smiling. Absolutely recommend.

reviews.author: Alex Tanjil
reviews.text: We tested( Le Pacha KEBAB ) about the time after 2 pm, we ordered, they did a first service which was genuinely perfect for the clients, but the main reason is about the food, the entire KEBAB looks great from the outside, but at the end it was filled with salad and sauces only, that's a disappointed.

reviews.author: Raymond Chenon
reviews.text:
Good kebab better than the average kebab in Paris.
The meat and condiments are great.
But not as good as Mustafa Gemuse in Berlin. If we are comparing to Paris Berlin kebab.

reviews.author: Iwo B
reviews.text: If you know kebabs you’ll know that there’s absolutely nothing special about this one. The ingredients are fresh, it’s well made and that’s it. The kebab should also be warmer- I ate it seconds after it was made and immediately felt that’s it’s barely warm. The spicy sauce is not really spicy. It’s ok for a stop but not worth any effort

reviews.author: Chad Buchanan
reviews.text: The food here is always fresh, hot and delicious. A must when I’m visiting Paris. Both green and white sauce are so good on the Nemesis Kebab. I Always love the little message on the delivery bag. Highly recommend.

reviews.author: Oleksii
reviews.text: Really weird taste as for kebab. You have the taste of dough in your mouth and that's it. A small amount of meat and sauce.

reviews.author: Shaun Fenty
reviews.text: I left London in 2010 and after that I could not find such a delicious kebab in other parts of the world(apart from Europe). Finally today in this place I found that delicious ambrosia taste. It is true that sometime even a tiny place can be very delicious. Thank guys, I was very happy. Promise to be back again! *****

reviews.author: Danijela Jelesijevic
reviews.text: It was best falafel sandwich ever. Very tasty with fresh coriander. Delicious. Staff were very friendly. I didn't find Parisians friendly or gentle at all, but those were :) Pleasant atmosphere and tasty food!!

name: Smash.B Élysée
address: 37 bis Rue de Ponthieu, 75008 Paris, France

reviews.author: Dominic Kamp
reviews.text: Not bad, but not really a smash burger either. The patty wasn’t smashed or crispy at all — more like a regular minced beef sandwich pretending to be one. Fries were fine, service was okay, but if you’re expecting that signature seared crust and juicy bite of a proper smash burger, this isn’t it.

reviews.author: R NA
reviews.text: The food is very delicious, leaning towards Arabic and Turkish styles in its preparation and flavors. It’s a satisfying and enjoyable experience, with excellent prices.

reviews.author: AJ Hr
reviews.text:
Very good taco, not wow but good. Somehow some of the filling were colder than the surrounding ingredients... Tells me they use frozen stuff and they did not heat/cook them correctly.

Nevertheless, good place.

It's halal.

Price is a bit high in my opinion.

I recommend.

reviews.author: Bakdaulet Konysbek
reviews.text: Smash.b Élysée — best double burger, great chicken burger, and amazing tacos loaded with chicken and sauce. Would recommend to everyone.

reviews.author: Ayda
reviews.text:
Margaritta pizza was so tasty.
Chicken sandwich too..
Until we find a hair in the sandwich. After we tell the worker, he said its chicken hair😂 and they brought us this one fried chicken, instead of sandwich. Its really funny!!!

reviews.author: Manwell Dos
reviews.text: Despite the tasty sandwiches, I paid 18 euros for two sandwiches without a drink, I think the price is excessive for fast food, takeaway.

reviews.author: Nurseit Kalbaev
reviews.text: Really delicious meal. We ordered 2 mix platters for three people and it was more then enough. Good place and reasonable prices.

reviews.author: Stephanie Perkins
reviews.text:
Great food, great host, great price! The host had such a positive attitude.. it made my day! If I didn’t live in American I would definitely be back very soon! Merci!
From America and Colombia! 😀

reviews.author: Stephen
reviews.text: My wife and I tried the food here and were delighted with the service and quality. The men that run the place were welcoming and kind. They offer a lot of variety on the menu and everything we tried was delicious and generously portioned. They have a house sauce made with garlic that we thoroughly enjoyed. Highly recommend and would look for them the next time we visit Paris.

reviews.author: Sadaf Mohamadi
reviews.text: The food was absolutely amazing. Everything was super fresh. The kabab and all the meat in general was super fresh. The workers were also kind and the restaurant was very welcoming. If your in the area definitely take a look at this restaurant.

reviews.author: MrCoolSwimmer
reviews.text: Expensive, little garnish and multiple hairs in my sandwich... very average, go elsewhere

reviews.author: Will Lomker
reviews.text: We stumbled across this place on vacation and my wife and I loved this place so much the first time we went out of our way to go back a second time. Great little spot to grab lunch!

reviews.author: Саодат Нуралиева
reviews.text: Cheap, friendly and tasty. Very big portion🥰🥰🥰

reviews.author: Ahsan Siddiqui
reviews.text:
Good food. Very Reasonable price at champ de élysées. Service is below standard.
Beef burger with coke and chips 5.5€
Chicken diner + burger + chips +coke 10€,
Cheese pizza 8€
Pics on google ad correct representation

reviews.author: jonsay241
reviews.text: Passing by got a burger and fries for kids. It was one of the only places that was opened a little late. It was good the kids said. So not bad find and service was pretty quick.

reviews.author: EXcellent stuFF
reviews.text:
This is an awesome Kebab Sandwich shop for on the go meal, perfect fpr tourists who dont want to waste time dining in for 3-8 course meals... I remember eating hot lamb sandwich during cold rainy nights in Paris around 10:30pm; super awesome.

I tried a number of lamb and chicken sandwiches from here and was thrilled by the taste and quality they offer under 10 Euros.
The owner and staff are very friendly too.

reviews.author: Ikhra Osman
reviews.text: This place bake their naan bread fresh in this ovn and there is cheese in between the layers. It’s truly amazing and the doner meat was very tasty :)

reviews.author: Jan Mazač
reviews.text: We had a late dinner here, ordered Berlin style and curry chicken. Both were delicious, huge portions.

reviews.author: abc
reviews.text: Amazing, Tried their chicken tandoori kebab and cheese naam falafel, absolutely worth the price!! People have a smile on their face so fantastic service! Highly recommended.

reviews.author: Cody Gahol
reviews.text: The cheese naan perfectly complements the meat! By far, this is my favorite kebab spot in the area! The serving size is pretty big!

reviews.author: Fares TAGHANE
reviews.text:
We ordered the lamb chops, which come with two sides. We chose fries, salad, smashed potatoes, and rice. The meat was outstanding—perfectly cooked and incredibly tender. All the sides were delicious and well prepared. The restaurant is very clean, beautifully decorated, and ideally located near the Arc de Triomphe on the Champs-Élysées. Special mention to Arhan, the Kurdish waiter, who was extremely polite, welcoming, and professional. Excellent food and great service. Highly recommended.
Thank you arhan

reviews.author: Shumy B
reviews.text:
This place is cosy, cute and calm.
Staff were warm and welcoming and service was efficient. Drinks and Starters came out promptly.
Mains came out in a timely manner following starters and all food was tasty.
Price was reasonable for location, in our opinion - we were a group of 3.
Bathroom was clean and stocked well.
Overall satisfied and would recommend this place for a halal place to eat.

reviews.author: Nazli Decker
reviews.text: By far the best place I’ve found for authentic Turkish cuisine. Every dish we tried at Helia was superbly executed, from the mezze and Beyti to the Adana and their house-made specialties. The ingredients were clearly top quality and treated with real care. If you’re after honest, delicious Turkish food done right, this is the place. + çay offert! Highly recommended!

reviews.author: Humaiyah ahmed
reviews.text:
I had a fantastic experience at Helia! The atmosphere is warm and inviting, with beautiful Mediterranean touches that make you feel instantly comfortable. The food is 100% halal Turkish food, which was great to know, and everything we tried was delicious and full of flavor.

We went for the €17 lunch menu, which was very worth the money — generous portions, beautifully presented, and full of taste. The bread came out warm and fluffy, perfect with the dips and starters. The rice and bulgur were cooked to perfection, and the potatoes were crispy on the outside yet soft inside. The kebab was juicy, perfectly seasoned, and paired wonderfully with the sides.

The presentation was thoughtful, served on stylish blue plates that made the colors of the food really pop. Portions were generous, and the meal felt both hearty and refined.

Overall, Helia offers an excellent halal Turkish dining experience with authentic Mediterranean flavors, great quality, and a cozy setting. I would definitely recommend it and can’t wait to come back!

reviews.author: Farah Mousbah
reviews.text:
We went yesterday to try this restaurant, it is really really good, also the atmosphere is very on point( Turkish music, even the water was put in an antique bottle) , the food also was served quickly
Maybe it is a bit expensive but overall it is really worth it. So you must give it a try

reviews.author: Liz Miles
reviews.text: A lovely place 2 eat generous portions lovely staff happy staff well looked after

reviews.author: Hassim Sánchez
reviews.text: It was great. Affordable and delicious! The owner was very kind and nice.

reviews.author: iza tsuriashvili
reviews.text: It was very tasty and good servise

reviews.author: 郭富綸
reviews.text: The meat are delicious,and the staff are also friendly!

reviews.author: Isabel Ozorio
reviews.text: Kebab really good and service fast and Nice people

reviews.author: Mehdi Ait Mesbah
reviews.text:
I don't understand the bad reviews.
The meat had good spices (which is so rare in french kebab)
Bread was good and full of meat, fries were ok (not fresh but good quality)
Will definitely come back next time i pass by Paris and need to eat something consistent and yummy.

reviews.author: Sam Kerr
reviews.text: Fantastic kebab from the friendly team here earlier today. Limited selection available, but that's frankly because their main product is so good, and their confidence in it really shines through. If you're hankering for a decent kebab, you can't do much better in the area than Les Freres.

reviews.author: Ian T
reviews.text: Kebab was so good!! Really good quality, homemade bread, and nice staff. Definitely stop by if you are near the Sacré Cœur!

reviews.author: Mohammad Daniel Bin Yusoff
reviews.text: I had a meal here today and it was very good. The kebab was juicy and tender and they put a special homemade sauce which adds to the flavour. I highly recommend this place for kebab.

reviews.author: Tainá Duarte
reviews.text: Been coming here for years. I can say with confidence it’s the best kebab in Paris. The queue doesn’t lie :)

reviews.author: Kiss János
reviews.text: Loved this place! The gyros at Berliner is seriously good – fresh ingredients, juicy meat and amazing sauces. Portions are big, prices are fair, and the staff is super friendly. If you’re in Paris and craving a great street food spot, this one’s a must. I’ll definitely be back! 😎

reviews.author: Noor Wadi
reviews.text: This restaurant serves some of the best halal fast food in Paris. The crispy chicken sandwiches were hot and fresh. We also got the bowl with chicken, and the chicken was delicious and well seasoned. This is a great spot for healthy, halal “fast” food.

reviews.author: Dilara Bilir
reviews.text: This is one of the best thing I’ve eat. Everything was so fresh and delicious. I was so hungry and I left the place so full and happy

reviews.author: A M
reviews.text:
Absolutely delicious doner — full of flavour, fresh, and perfectly cooked! You can really taste the quality in every bite.

The service was just as impressive — both the woman and man serving were so kind, friendly, and welcoming. They made me feel right at home and clearly take pride in what they do.

I highly recommend this place to anyone looking for great food and wonderful customer service. I’ll definitely be coming back again!

reviews.author: Farhan Chowdhury
reviews.text: Brilliant end to a fantastic trip in Paris. Having had a lot of different donner places back home it was a good opportunity to try something here in the capital. The donner meat was succulent with a great proportion of salad to meat. Usually don't get that much meat but was pleasantly surprised by the Berliner. Would recommend this place as it is filling and tasty!!!

reviews.author: Mohamed Yones
reviews.text: A sweet Turkish restaurant operated by Turkish guys....They serve great and delicious dishes contain Halal Food

reviews.author: Ali Naghdian
reviews.text: Terrible food. Stay away from this restaurant. I ordered cheeseburger and the meat was frozen and not fresh at all.

reviews.author: Lizzy Stocker
reviews.text: A real nice surprise - good food and good friendly service

reviews.author: Ricsi Nagy
reviews.text: Large servings, very tasty, nice view.

reviews.author: Maria Lada
reviews.text: Have been vomiting all night from kebab sandwich, to avoid! Being diagnosed with food poisoning.

reviews.author: Tim E
reviews.text:
FRERES
& BATIGNOLLES - this area seems to be loaded with kebab options. The boys here serve a very different kebab rolled in with a big stack of hot chips and wrapped in a paper but the chicken was tasty. The lahmacon was my favourite and I would order it again 🍖

reviews.author: Ismail
reviews.text: We came here after reading it’s the best Kebab in Paris ! We tried it and we can confirm it’s the best. The meat tastes really good with their special seasoning. Beware there might be a line but worth the wait.

reviews.author: Arnold Robinson
reviews.text: We went here on the recommendation of a local parisian that this was the best kebab in Paris. It did not disappoint. The meat was flavored, very tender and juicy. The bread was very fresh and complimented the kebab well. We arrived at 2pm and had no wait. We traveled 30 minutes for this place and it was worth it.

reviews.author: Alireza Sadeghi
reviews.text: We were there around 22:20,they were out of service,  it's better in you website put right hours ,not we close 22:30 means we have service till 22:30

reviews.author: Carlos Arroyo
reviews.text: Food was amazing and very fast service!!!

reviews.author: Yang Fu
reviews.text: Food was tasty and staff quite nice! Normally one should feel quite full with its meal. The ordering machine provides multi language portals but in the end it was basically French 🤣

reviews.author: Iwo B
reviews.text: Finally, after 3 months of living in Paris I’ve found a perfect kebab spot. Service is very fast and food is delicious. Highly recommend the spicy option.

reviews.author: Zac Newton
reviews.text: While living in Paris, I have made it my quest to find the best kebab in the 18th arrondissement. This might just be it. Upon entering, you are met with the most welcoming of hosts, who will talk to you as you await your kebab. However, this talk doesn't last long as the service is quick and efficient. The rapidity of it all does not impede the taste in any way, though. Everything is made in house, even the sauce, and it is noticeable. A brilliant experience that I have to recommend if you want a quick meal after your walk around Montmartre!

reviews.author: Lulu pearl
reviews.text:
The best kebab sandwich I have had in Paris 😍!! It was juicy and delicious 😋, the bread was fresh and fluffy with sesame seed and black seeds on top , the meat was tender and tasty, the fries are unique, crispy, and was slightly pealed, so you can see some skin on it 👌, the serving is big , and enough to satisfy your hunger and  way more .. they have a self ordering option , so you can customize your sandwich to your own desire, the Turkish employee working there  (turns out to be the manger and the chief )was very nice , humble , and friendly with a great smile on his face , he helped us on choosing the home made bread , not the regular wrap 👌

He even gave us a delicious baklava ( Arabic / Turkish sweet ) made by them as a gift  💕

The place is super clean , from the table , to their working area , to the toilet ..

The serving plates are  made of wooden , and over it they put cute news paper like food paper , wich I found it so lovely , and casual ..

I definitely recommend this place .. the best over all other Turkish restaurant I have tried in Paris 👍👍👍👍👍

reviews.author: Ele Z.
reviews.text:
We just left the place. My hands still smell like the wood fire. The kebab is truly amazing. The pita bread comes completely stuffed with quality meat and up to six toppings of your choice. Depending on the version, it comes with feta, cheddar, jalapeños, in addition to common toppings like lettuce, tomato, and red onion.

There are other Turkish kebab places in the area, but none of them smell like this one. As soon as you cross the street towards the place, the delicious aroma hits you, and it’s impossible not to go inside.

The place is clean, the service is quick, and the staff is very friendly and always smiling.

Can’t wait to come back!

reviews.author: bita nasr
reviews.text: A real Turkish kebab experience in the heart of Paris! We had the döner kebab, and it tasted really great—fresh, flavorful, and made with high-quality meat. The dürüm and döner are both delicious. The restaurant is small and simple, but perfect for a quick and tasty meal. Prices are very reasonable, especially considering Paris standards and the generous portion size compared to other restaurants. It’s an excellent option for a fast and affordable lunch. The staff is friendly, and service is quick. Very close to Opera station, so easy to reach on foot.

reviews.author: ALi Hosseini
reviews.text: The food is really good , we had turkish dönner sandwich and it was very well cooked and delicious. If they had better service and atmosphere it would be a great place to stay and enjoy. However the food is good and we enjoyed. I recommend.

reviews.author: Murtaza Badri
reviews.text:
Really enjoyed my dinner. English speaking staff, who were able to serve a scrumptious #HALAL #Turkish meal.
The meat was very tender and juicy, the salad serving was perfect.
Tea at the end was refreshing.

reviews.author: Keemia Kaboli
reviews.text: We tried the assiette asana, kebab, and then baklava. Everything tasted pretty good. The ambiance is beautiful. The staff are kind. The location is central. The yogurt sauce is sooo good too. I love that everything is homemade. Definitely recommend this place if you’re on a budget and looking for a decent place to eat!

reviews.author: Enjey Batsukh
reviews.text: Best Döner i’ve ever had in Paris. The sauce, the fries are incredible.

reviews.author: Luke W
reviews.text: Incredibly friendly,  attentive to dietary allergies. Delicious and affordable. Magnificent late night food.

reviews.author: Sarah Harb
reviews.text: The staff were so friendly and attentive. I ate cheeseburger menu and my husband ate kebap plate. And we found the food delicious for a good price in Paris .

reviews.author: Anish Kushalapa
reviews.text:
Hands down one of the best restaurants I have been to in Paris.

The owner was the kindest man ever and made some awesome food. Having lived in the Middle East my whole life, this food was amazing!

reviews.author: Marin Buffington
reviews.text: Best food we had when visiting Paris. The workers were very welcoming. We were here only two nights, and ended up coming both nights. Highly recommend!

reviews.author: craig slota
reviews.text: It rare to see a Parisian kebab shop with a 5-star review but admittedly these guys do a lot of things to merit the score.  First the staff are very friendly and this is important.  The restaurant itself was super clean.  Food itself was delicious and the bread was great.  If I'm in the area, I will come back and can recommend the place without question.

reviews.author: Ela Prod
reviews.text: Went with my sister twice on our stsy in Paris. First of all they were so nice even though of the communication barrier. The food was delicious. There is a nice view. The prices are excellent for the portion served. At the end they served us tea which felt like a hug to our soul. Amazing! If I lived near I would definitely visit regularly. Until next time.

reviews.author: Nicolette Peters
reviews.text: Absolutely delicious! My partner and I were craving bbq meat and chips and this was perfect. The owner was lovely and drew a little heart on my plate in sauce 🙂‍↔️ we will definitely be back again ❤️

reviews.author: F G
reviews.text: It was very good experience of having kebab & chicken Chika at this restaurant! The staff & atmosphere is nice n chill! Food price reasonable and we received free serving tea and desserts from the shop owner!!!

reviews.author: George Dallas
reviews.text:
What a wonderful, cozy and amazing experience we had at this Turkish restaurant. The food was delicious and the owner was so polite and friendly. He actually took our order, cooked it and served it to us. This place is a must if you're looking for quality Turkish food.
Thank you!

reviews.author: Heilin Reimand
reviews.text: Incredibly good food!!! Fast service, nice Turks, simple but super good! Awesome music playlist!

reviews.author: Aman Bhatia

reviews.author: Guðmundur Karl Karlsson

reviews.author: Mohamed hambli

reviews.author: Timothée POSTEL
reviews.text: It is freaking delicious, the host is just the best

name: Grill Istanbul
address: 3 Rue Marguerite de Rochechouart, 75009 Paris, France

reviews.author: Paris and Beyond Tours
reviews.text:
Very good local kebab. The owner makes his own meat on the broach.

I’m eating a keto diet and this is so great.
I had the Adana kebab, with a lot of salad, mix of onions tomatoes and salads. He adds lemon juice a dash of olive oil and some Turkish spices.

The meat is juicy and flavourful ! Such an amazing place ! They don’t have real coffee, only machine, but you take the Ayran, the Turkish traditional drink with the meat.

I can several times, the meatballs, the kebab ( truly amazing ) the chicken. Everything is amazing !

reviews.author: Zoey Zou
reviews.text: Ordered lamb and mixed. Great portion and delicious meat!! The owner is really funny. We felt very welcomed. He even can speak some Chinese. We had a very satisfied dinner at this place. Thank you! Would definitely recommend to anyone!

reviews.author: Remington Robinson
reviews.text: Overall, it was a lovely experience and the food was delicious. Perfect for a cold day.

reviews.author: Hennock
reviews.text: Very lovely food, at very reasonable prices. The staff are friendly and catering, I highly recommend.

reviews.author: Nicholas Jenson
reviews.text: Maybe the best late night option in the neighborhood. Food arrives fast and is flavorful. The wraps were jam packed with juicy kebab. Staff speaks good English and were inviting and helpful when our Uber was running late.

reviews.author: warwick clifton
reviews.text: Quite possibly the best kebab I've eaten in France. Not a donor kebab with minced meat of dubious quality/origin, this was proper small, slices of  lamb delicately seasoned and served in a thick, fluffy naan type bread pocket. The portions are enormous and the chips are well cooked (twice fried) so are nice and crispy but soft and fluffy inside. It's just a kiosk/hole in the wall type takeaway but the small queue of locals/regulars tells the story of its quality and value. Despite it's popularity, service was swift and friendly, with the server tolerating my poor french with a smile. Recommend the small park just 200 metres away next to the square Batignolles if you are looking to eat your kebabs 'picnic stylee'. Well worth a visit if you are visiting around the mont Martre area.

reviews.author: Tim E
reviews.text: They make lahmacun too 🍕

reviews.author: Queka Bawa
reviews.text: Authentic turkish kebab with homemade bread. Very clean and absolutely tasty. Very close from montmartre you can take away and eat it on the steps just on the parallel street. Metro Barbes. Totally recommend . Very affordable deal 10€ for kebab , french fries and a drink!

reviews.author: Kimberly Fehr
reviews.text: I was hungry, this kebab filled me. A bit messy eats but very tasty. Fast service for a takeaway.

reviews.text: All the staff members lively, friendly and food for sure is delish!!! Good ambiance with lively music makes the meal more enjoyable!!! 👍👏⭐⭐🌟 definitely NOT JUST A KEBAB🤩

reviews.author: David Beil
reviews.text: Super awesome place, the vibe was very relaxed and the two guys serving me were very proper and professional. The chicken kebab sandwich I had was great, but the meat could've been spiced a bit more. Otherwise 5/5. I will try the shaved meat next time.

reviews.author: Samuel Martinez
reviews.text: Great service super friendly people. Don't speak english but make the best effort to help, communicate and understand. Fresh ingredients and super clean place. Recommend!

reviews.author: Mister Penguin
reviews.text: Clean, authentic Turkish cuisine and decoration, good service, tasty food and generous size. Give it a try!

reviews.author: Daniel Sienko
reviews.text: Full 5 stars for each of the aspects. Turkish music in the background, waiters and chefs are extremely kind and the food... The food is so delicious. Çig köfte is my absolute favourite. The structure of burglur wheat and multiple flavours felt at the same time was an amazing experience and that was just a beginning. Main dishes full of different unexpected flavors. Prices are low and portions big. For the dessert they have the best baklava in the world and kunefe we had for the first time really stole our hearts. 10/10.

reviews.author: _kerim te
reviews.text:
Long Review, but I wanted to share my amazing experience here!
I have been in Paris a few times now and everytime I come back here, I just have to eat at Supreme Durum at least once! The service and staff are very welcoming and kindhearted people.
I was very hesitant to try a new Kebab place in Paris, because I haven't made many good experiences Till now, but this place overcame all my expectations.
First of all to the atmosphere of the restaurant, it has an amazing turkish vibe and especially if you are a turkish tourist lost in a big city like Paris, you will feel at home here.
I love their decorations, pictures and the whole ambiente of the restaurant, especially if you know about older turkish artists, you will love it here. It really gives it a good turkish touch.
Now I will get to the food and the taste. I have tried almost every Durum on their menu and also a Pide and the Lahmacun a few times now.
The meat of the Durum is very well spiced and really tender. I enjoyed every bite of every Durum. I love the freshness of the ingredients and garnishes. They do not just put simple onions inside, they even "spice" up their onions for example and it doesn't taste just like plain salad put inside of your Durum.
Their Durums are never dry, because they soak the lavash on the juices of the meat and even put a bit of the meats juices on top of it, while also "grilling" the bread, so it does not dry out. I really love their way of preparing it and I'd miss out on not eating one, while being in Paris.
The Pide and Lahmacun Master is really skilled and really puts lots of effort into fulfilling his art. They look really appetizing and they also put enough toppings on them  making them even more delicious.
Last but not least, the generosity of the owner and chefs there. They always welcome you with a smile and you can have a good conversations with them.
They even remembered my face, even though I have not been here for a few months now. It has really become one of my most favourite restaurant here in Paris. So if you are searching for the most amazing grilled kebab place of Paris, I'd highly recommend this restaurant and if you just want to have a quick snack, you should not walk past this place without trying it, it is definetely worth it!!! 10/10!!

reviews.author: Artem Bakatov
reviews.text: Superb place for Turkish food!!! Just incredible - I was blown away by the quality and the freshness of everything. This place is defined a gem. The service is friendly and make you feel very welcomed - they will answer any questions and give you suggestions. A big part of my fondness of this place is that they grill their meet using actual fire therefore you get that smokey feeling.

reviews.author: Thomas Vuillermoz

reviews.text: Oh how i wish chicago had this. We ordered one pork and one kufta. The kufta was amazing. Maybe my favorite lunch in all of paris.

I am Turkish and have enough experience to objectively evaluate doner/gyro/shawarma quality. Bedri brothers has one of the best examples of doner outside the mainland.
I live abroad and was visiting Paris. I was pleased and surprised to find a doner shop as the best restaurant in the neighborhood and they surpassed my expectations. It is a quick and clean restaurant serving delicious doner.

If you like iskander, this one here is one of the best I've had. Came back  few times and it's always amazing.

Go try 🔥

reviews.author: James Hall
reviews.text: Personally I think they have the best doner kebab meat in Paris. There's the sandwich shop, small but excellent and the restaurant which offers some great Turkish dishes. I highly recommend.

reviews.text:
Best EVER shish kebab, served in fresh baguettes we bought at the bakery down the street, following lentil soup, and accompanied by creamy aryan . 31eur total for two.
Bustling in the evening, worth perching inside or outside and enjoying the vibe.

reviews.author: Oğulcan Bozdemir
reviews.text: One of the best in Paris. The manager Volkan is such a nice gentleman, talkative, friendly and helpful. Adana is out of this planet, Iskender is amazing… do yourself a favour and try different things here. Homemade ayran is one of the best.

reviews.author: sena ozan
reviews.text: Everything was amazing—from the taste and service to the staff's approachability, which made me feel as if I were in Bursa, the birthplace of İskender

reviews.author: Matteo Scabbia
reviews.text: Incredible food fairly priced kebab less of a cost of a pint in the UK!!!!

reviews.author: Joic Majo

reviews.author: Kathryn McQuillan
reviews.text: The longest wait I have ever experienced

reviews.author: Jan Bałdyga
reviews.text: Very good tacos. Not expensive. A new place with nice service.

reviews.author: elisa cataneo
reviews.text:
Fast service, affordable prices in Macron's France (I'm more used to seeing a kebab for less than €9.50).
We went for seconds; the kebab was juicy and filled with onions, steaming hot and crispy. Excellent. We finished everything, scraped off the sauce, and the paper was all clean.
The chef brought us the whole roll to dry, and of course, we went to talk to him to thank him for this wonderful experience we had at 10:30 p.m. after a long day of work and a terrible movie.
Please go ahead. I know line 2 with the Barbès-Stalingrad-Jaurès-Belleville combination is scary, but stop at Jaurès and take the road where you pass a line of Quechua tents to try this kebab and its onions marinated in the meat. Passionate people, they're on the ball until 2 a.m., serving you as if it were still 7 p.m.
A place of excellence that should, in my opinion, be listed as a cultural and national heritage site.
The 24-inch Ultra HD TV broadcasting Channel 17 won me over. It's a shame ZEVENT donations don't fund the establishment; they should.
Thank you to the chef, thank you to the waitress, thank you to Jaurès, and thank you to the lamb that died for these kebabs.
Itadakimasu.

reviews.author: Dylan Glynn
reviews.text: i live in the area and have been having a kebab here for about 10 years. despite inflation and covid etc, this place remains excellent. not so cheap, but not expensive for paris prices these days. the kebabs are simply excellent!! the two young guys who work, and have worked, there for years are super friendly. the only negative is that it is very cramped at lunch break - but that's paris and the toilet is also not the best - but again, that's Paris. The older gentleman who works during the day, and who assume is the owner, has a tendency to "hover" over you - i expect in the hope that you will leave quickly and free the table. but overall - one of the best kebabs in Paris !

Food 4/5

Staff - 5/5

reviews.text: Truly catwalk kebab that looks amazing, so amazing you would almost forget that taste is important as well. Is it the best kebab I ever had, no but far not. reviews.author: Eva Rodas

reviews.author: Muhammed Uddin

reviews.author: Navid Anayati

reviews.author: Mehdi S

One if the best kebab place in Paris for sure!
Everything is home made, super fresh and tasty, skewers are grilled on charcoal. The portions are very generous and the staff super nice and welcoming.

reviews.author: Razaan VZ
reviews.text: My friend suffered from food poisoning after eating here. Our meals were identical until dinner, when she had the chicken here in a mixed grill and I only had meat. Disgusting. Sick of French restaurants without hygiene ratings. Be careful when visiting France, eat vegetarian food only, cause their high rates of salmonella and food borne diseases in restaurants like this are absolutely not worth the risk. Wish we were aware of this sooner

reviews.author: Jen Chieh Han

Kebab here is so good. Love the juicy lamb screwer, the rice, and I guess Job’s tear might be in the plate. I can’t prove in person due to I don’t speak French, though I tried to check with the owner.

Anyway, I had good memory here and enjoyed nice lunch.
