reviews.author: Ivonne Roa Rodríguez
reviews.text:
After reading all the amazing reviews we decided to give it a try. Very disappointing!  I asked for only a bit of garlic sauce and wasn’t able to taste the vegetables because there was A LOT of sauce, couldn’t feel any other flavor on the kebab. Also, halloumi was so fried that it was not chewy. I just think the bread is very very good but for the rest, I wouldn’t go back.
We also ordered a regular chicken kebab. The chicken felt dry.

Not recommended if you look for a kebab where you can feel the fresh vegetables.

reviews.author: Charith Chathuranga
reviews.text:
Superb kebap I have ever eaten in Paris. Great taste. Natural taste without artificial flavors. Reasonable good price.
serving healthy . Helpful friendly staff. They are speaking english too. Nothing to say any bad thing. Good luck guys.

reviews.author: Anja Jönsson
reviews.text: Otimo! Best in Paris! So sweet staff and amazing sauce.

reviews.author: Steve Sutton
reviews.text: The last time I was there was 3 years ago. I can’t stop thinking about the Berliner I had. One of the best things I’ve ever eaten.

reviews.author: Léon Zippel
reviews.text:
Even for Germany/Berlin standards that's a damn good Döner Kebab!
Feels just like home, if not better!

Also really nice fries and classic German softdrinks.

Highly recommend!

reviews.author: B G
reviews.text: Meat quality was terrible. The fat was dripping of my bread.l, but bread itself was delicious but the rest was just terrible. I won’t recommend because it is way overpriced for what you receive. Inside the shop was quite small and packed together with other customers. Thanks for the food but I won’t come back.

reviews.author: Azthour
reviews.text: We stumbled upon this fast food place by chance and had an absolutely amazing time. The flavors were incredible, with 100% homemade, high-quality products. On top of that, the staff was fantastic exactly what we look for. Thank you so much for the experience! We'll be coming back very, very soon. Congratulations on the incredible food and those cookies are to die for!

reviews.author: Gowri Shangar
reviews.text: Lovely lovely lovely kebab. Simple and delicious

reviews.author: craig slota
reviews.text:
Ill faut parler avec la direction.

Any day over the weekend there is never chicken. The last 6 times I get the same answer, sorry, there's nothing left since 7pm. Seriously?

If you can't guarantee the menu, change the menu!!!!

Two stars instead of five. Fix your house Berliner.

reviews.author: Mattias Mengoni
reviews.text:
Amazing Kebab, "Berliner Das Original" is not just their name but also a correct statement.

I had the chicken wrap, the meat and sauces were great but also the vegetables were incredible. The fries on the side were also some of the best I have ever had and would also just order those for a quick bite.

Overall a great price/quality/quantity ratio.

reviews.author: Tim Cheung
reviews.text: High quality kebab with high quality service! The kebab meat was delicious and you can add truffle in the kebab for that extra richness. The staff are also very friendly and welcoming. Open till late so you can get a yummy kebab after a night out that tastes great and isn’t greasy.

reviews.author: Megan
reviews.text: Ordered from here yesterday, Kebab was fine, there was no sauce (which I asked for) and barely any vegetables. The CHURROS ON THE OTHER HAND were light yellow 😭😭😭 I wish I took a pic but I was baffled when I saw that

reviews.author: Thi Le Nguyen
reviews.text: I had a very disappointing experience with the kebab my boyfriend ordered here. Upon serving, I immediately noticed a strange, off smell coming from the food. Despite my warning, he decided to go ahead and eat it as he thought little of it. He only managed to eat half before feeling unwell. About five minutes after leaving, he ended up vomiting. This was a concerning and unpleasant experience, and I wouldn't recommend this place based on the quality and safety of their food.

reviews.author: Nathan P.
reviews.text:
A culinary experience to forget. We ordered an “original” and a “doner” from this establishment yesterday, and I can say that it was probably the worst kebab I've ever eaten in my life (sadly). And I know what I'm talking about.

The meat was alarmingly bland - probably not as fresh as it should have been, because to top it all off, we spent the whole night sick (sparing you the details). The kebab bread was a very dry kind of waffle. As for the other toppings, they were pretty desolate too: not a tomato in sight, and three bits of onion chasing each other. How can you serve a kebab without these basic ingredients (even though they're listed on the menu)?

I understand the vagaries of the fast-food business, but when health is at stake, it's not acceptable. The brand name is also intended to represent a certain “standing”...

To be avoided absolutely...

reviews.author: Irene Economidou
reviews.text: We dined there at 12am, but even though there were flies everywhere (which they couldnt do anything about but apologized) the food was absolutely tasty and clean. Staff was very friendly too!

name: GRILL ADANA
address: 83 Rue de la Roquette, 75011 Paris, France

reviews.author: Hak Bén
reviews.text: Friendly service and excellent food. I ordered the chicken plate, everything was tasty and fresh. Outdoor and indoor seating available. 15 euros total which included a drink. The plate includes rice, chicken, salad and French fries. I requested garlic sauce and chili sauce which added great flavor. The salad was dressed a bit heavy for my liking but aside from that everything was great. They also open late.

reviews.author: GUIDO GARAY
reviews.text:
I went to Grill Adana and ordered the Mixte plate, and honestly, it was amazing. The restaurant has such a chill, cozy vibe — the smell of the grill hits you as soon as you walk in, and the staff are super welcoming and friendly.

The Mixte plate was perfect. It had a bit of everything: chicken, lamb, and beef, all grilled just right. The meat was tender, juicy, and full of flavor, and the seasoning was spot on. The rice and salad on the side were fresh and really balanced out the whole plate.

The service was honestly one of the best parts. Everyone there was super nice and easygoing, and they made me feel comfortable without being too formal or pushy. You can tell they actually care about their customers.
Overall, Grill Adana totally deserves five stars — great food, great people, and a great atmosphere. I’m 100% coming back.

reviews.author: MR CL
reviews.text:
Amazing little gem in Paris. Definitely worth a visit, I ordered the adana grill with coke. The portion was huge and was enough for two people. It was fresh and tasty, it came with rice, chips, grilled bread & salad.

Server confirmed food is halal.

The inside of the restaurant was super clean & all the staff members were really polite.

5/5

reviews.author: A Zahid
reviews.text: Amazing place and amazing staff, offered a free cup of tea. Must visit

reviews.author: Jesse Morgan
reviews.text: Probably the nicest kebab place I’ve ever been too. Great food and the service is exceptional. Friendly, clean. Everything was fresh. Will be a regular here.

name: La Cappadoce- Restaurant Turc Paris
address: 98 Rue de la Roquette, 75011 Paris, France

reviews.author: Ahmed Kradi
reviews.text:
My wife and I came across La Cappadoce while shopping in the afternoon, and it immediately caught our attention. We took a look at the menu and everything sounded so good that we knew we had to stop in—and we’re very glad we did.

The Istanbul platter was the star of the meal. It’s an excellent way to experience a variety of meats, and each one was cooked beautifully. The flavors were rich, the textures were perfect, and everything came out hot and seasoned just right.

Another big plus is that the menu is fully halal, which is great to see and really appreciated.

The atmosphere inside is lively and full of character. The decor is interesting and adds to the experience, giving the restaurant a distinct personality. It does get a bit loud during the dinner rush, but it’s still completely manageable to hold a conversation and enjoy the meal.

The service was great throughout—friendly, attentive, and welcoming. Overall, La Cappadoce delivered a fantastic dining experience with delicious food, great service, and a vibrant atmosphere. Definitely worth stopping by if you’re in the area.

reviews.author: Maria Zorrilla
reviews.text: A must try! The food is delicious - the prices are on par - and they have a great lunch special as well. More than anything the hospitality is top notch - no matter what language you do (or don’t) speak they make great efforts to make you feel comfortable and take care of your needs. Will be returning before the end of my trip (:

reviews.author: Uupham
reviews.text:
Really good place for kebab.
The price is quiet cheap if you take menu midi.
Good quality of meat and seasoning
The dessert that we took following the menu recommendations is also good however it's really sweet for my taste..
Will comback!

reviews.author: Rishad A.R
reviews.text:
Good food. Served hot. Served well.

Tried their chicken skewers and doner. Taste was good. Portion was enough for one. Price was reasonable.

Staffs were friendly and ambience was good.

reviews.author: Madeleine Reiter
reviews.text: The food was super delicious and fresh. The service was friendly and attentive. Absolutely recommendable – I’ll definitely come back!

name: Paristanbul
address: 154 Rue du Chemin Vert, 75011 Paris, France

reviews.author: Md Ove
reviews.text:
Very good experience at Restaurant Istanbul! The food was fresh, delicious, and full of flavor. The kebabs and grilled meat were perfectly cooked, and the portions were generous. The bread was warm and tasty.

The staff was friendly, welcoming, and the service was fast. The restaurant was clean and comfortable.

I highly recommend this place if you want to enjoy authentic Turkish food in France. I will definitely come back again!

reviews.author: Christian Kramp
reviews.text: Unfortunately this was a kebab made without love.  The sandwich was stuffed like it was an assembly line’s work and the meat had no taste.I wish the owners that they can improve their food, because they were kind. Just that I order food to eat and not kindness.

reviews.author: joe thompson
reviews.text: I ordered the mix plate, be prepared for alot of fantastic food!! Staff was very fast to prepare our meal.

reviews.author: Michael Wilkinson
reviews.text: Nice clean place, good food and nice guys. Reasonably priced.

reviews.author: Beth Harris
reviews.text: Not too bad for a cheap kebab lunch.  Nothing fancy, but the kebab was tasty.  Most everything else was  nearly flavorless by comparison.

reviews.author: Hassan Basri Sathik
reviews.text: The Sandwiches and Paninis were amazing. Excellent hospitality. Highly recommended.

reviews.author: 21Pringle Chips
reviews.text: Very nice food, very nice people and very nice price

reviews.author: Léa Dignimont
reviews.text: Youssef top

reviews.author: N
reviews.text: Excellent !!!!

reviews.author: Maiko Meyers
reviews.text: Good food, very yummy. 10/10 would do again

reviews.author: Pragya Saxena
reviews.text: Portions were too big. Staff was nice just be friendly to them. Food was great. My favorite type of fries but there was way too much food!!!

reviews.author: Tom Gitelman
reviews.text: Great price and great kebab!!! Lovely owner as well

reviews.author: Coco Mbunzama
reviews.text: Good food

reviews.author: Jonathan Castiaux
reviews.text: Good neighborhood kebab

reviews.author: Rustem Babayev
reviews.text: It is the first place I can feel the real taste of meat. It is really a great place

reviews.author: Dee
reviews.text: It is a lovely restaurant, I ordered a kebab plate, my partner ordered a kebab wrap. The meat was so lovely, the service was fast. We would love to go again.

reviews.author: Mr Lexi
reviews.text: the food was amazing, really good price, staff was amazing and fast with food, can only recommend!!!

reviews.author: William Janitra Lie
reviews.text: The lamb, is a must choice. So good. Kebab is very good aswell. Had a wonderful lunch here.

reviews.author: Heesoo Park
reviews.text: Friendly owner and delicious food. If you're looking for a delicious kebab in Paris, this is the place to go.

reviews.author: Édouard Dubois
reviews.text: One of the best kebabs in Paris. And I’ve ate many of them. Very friendly staff

reviews.author: Befanina
reviews.text: Orgasmicly good kebab “faits maison”! Like 12 out of 10! I am an absolute kebab expert so it’s not easy to impress me but here - WOW! 🙌 The service is another wow! The lady who is working here is really taking care of you. I will definitely come back even though it’s not my neighbor at all. Recommend big time!!

reviews.author: Nexplorer
reviews.text:
What a pleasure to discovery this place and the hearty people bringing it to life!.

The wraps are wondrous.
The fries and sauce, too!

And the service is, of course, second to none 🌟

P.S:Apologies for the so-so picture.
The ambiance and food was too good!

reviews.author: Julia PUJOL
reviews.text: Great kebab! Tasty meat, good ingredients, homemade sauce. 7,50€ with fries. Very nice owner

reviews.author: Jessica Thai (Sica)
reviews.text: My favoriteee kebab place and late night go to. The lady who works there is the nicest person I’ve ever met and has amazing energy. Her and the chefs really put love in the food and show that they care! The first time I came, she gave a me a sample of their house viande and I have gotten it every time after 🤤

name: Urban Grill
address: 104 Rue du Faubourg Saint-Antoine, 75012 Paris, France

reviews.author: Lucas Resck
reviews.text:
URBAN GRILL is a nice place to eat a quick kebab late at night. Prices are reasonable and food is plenty – I almost couldn't finish it. I especially enjoyed the fries. I also liked the sandwich kebab, even though I was expecting a little bit more.

The staff was very friendly and the place was shiny, however we thought the music was a little bit loud. I would recommend the place for people looking for a nice kebab late at night and would come back again.

reviews.author: Essra Altayeb
reviews.text: They are very nice , and the freies was amazing  , very good price  with big  portion

reviews.author: Greg Georgios Rodakidis (Move')
reviews.text: Great place, nice music all the time, people are very friendly, really nice kebab and big portions, THE best french fries in the neighborhood, probably the best in Paris

reviews.author: Juan Pablo Jurczyszyn
reviews.text: Kebab was a relleno great of the city of París! The best one ever!

reviews.author: Amira Suffy
reviews.text: This is the best and most affordable place to eat at in Bastille. The service is amazing and the food is even better. If I could take them back to the states I would. I was treated very well and they always made sure my food was cooked to perfection. I’m only sad to leave Paris because I’ll never be able to come back here.

reviews.author: Sarra Boughanmi
reviews.text: I am in Paris for two years now , this kebab is great especially in galette bread. Very fresh ingredients and juicy meat 🤤🤤🤤

reviews.author: Nariah Is
reviews.text: Freshly baked kebabs and fries. Friendly owner!!

reviews.author: Abderrahmane Radjah
reviews.text: It was a wonderful discovery! The sandwiches were made with fresh, high-quality ingredients compared to other kebab shops, and the fries were homemade. Everything had a Tunisian touch. The owner was very welcoming and kind. It was delicious, thank you!

reviews.author: Simon ROBERT
reviews.text: One of the best kebab shops in the 11th arrondissement, with good quality ingredients (generous artisanal bread, excellent meat, and homemade fries far superior to the frozen ones we usually get). I highly recommend it!

reviews.author: Sébastien Cem Gokdemir
reviews.text:
Honestly, a good place if you're craving Tunisian food with a Parisian street food vibe.

I was in the mood for a merguez sandwich. Here, the merguez sausages are from the butcher.

The fries are homemade, well-cooked, and crispy, but slightly too oily.

The bread is homemade, but I wasn't a big fan because it was dry, not toasted, and not even slightly warmed.

I got a set menu for under €10 with a sandwich, homemade fries, and a drink.

The restaurant is small but quiet.

Give it a try, because it was still good!

name: Elbaraka Food
address: 138 Rue de la Roquette, 75011 Paris, France

reviews.author: Owen Clayton
reviews.text: Cheap, greasy kabab. The fries weren't very good, but the greek sandwich itself was quite tasty. I put the fries right on the sandwich for something a little different.

reviews.author: Isabell
reviews.text: Even though they ask you plenty of questions what you want to have inside your falafel or kebap there is not much in it. Only meat and sauce. The worst kebap I had so far in my life. They propose you a big variety of sauces to choose like "samurai" "algerienne" but if you ask what that means they are bored about your question, turn around and never answer. Bad service, bad food

reviews.author: Anders Rehnberg
reviews.text: Gerst kebab, always friendly service and good prices. Highly recommend Le Grec!

reviews.author: Fredoo Funk
reviews.text: Super good food, friendly staff, great place.

reviews.author: jo mon
reviews.text: Good food

reviews.author: Luka Loteng TM
reviews.text: Lamb kebab! Had never seen nor tasted that before. That was absolutely delicious and nice. Very cool, friendly and professional guys too! Not expensive. Recommended highly!!!

reviews.author: candelaria pallares
reviews.text:
Amazing Turkish food , healthy and flavorful.

I got their plate with chicken and beef and wow, it was simply amazing. The bread is soooo good specially with the white sauce they bring it with. Their harissa is spicy but not overwhelming.

Big plates for such a great price!

reviews.author: Nina Wiget
reviews.text: Thank you for letting us use the toilet.

reviews.author: Seb H
reviews.text: Best kebabs and sandwiches in the 11eme. I've been coming here for 20 years and honestly the quality is just as good and prices are very reasonable. Kudos to the great owners/managers for resisting gentrification and offering real food for the real people of this neighborhood

reviews.author: Azari Amin
reviews.text: Near to metro station. Generous portions and very tasty. Friendly guys, good selections of sauces and reasonable prices. i came to eat more than once during my stay in Paris. Nice ambience too!

reviews.author: Bruno Bensaid
reviews.text: Apart from the fact there is no A/C (like most restaurants), our experience was great. The food was inexpensive and copious, tasty, fatty but not overwhelming, and the sauces were home-made. We hope to be back soon (super convenient near Reuilly-Diderot tube station).

reviews.author: Beatriz da Silva Pereira
reviews.text: Simply amazing! I ate there twice in a row and was delighted by the food and friendly staff.

reviews.author: Simon O'Connor
reviews.text: Superb. Far exceeded my expectations. A wonderful welcome, great food and generous portions.

reviews.author: Jaderson Marques Vargas
reviews.text: Amazing food and small price.

reviews.author: Viccenzo Leonardo
reviews.text: Very good food and polite waitress.

reviews.author: Inayia
reviews.text: Really nice experience here, alhamdulillah. The food was fresh and tasty, the service was good, and the atmosphere was welcoming. Would definitely recommend and come back again.

reviews.author: Mustafa Kureyşi
reviews.text: It was amazing. They are very good and sincere people and their döner is amazing. You can find the place always clean. Also you can eat Turkish food.  You should definitely stop there and eat something!

reviews.author: blank
reviews.text: meat flavored cardboard and no sauce in the kebab, just a little on the fries, didn’t make the food much edible. cheers

reviews.author: Zoe Zoo
reviews.text: This restaurant has a very good taste recommendation 100%

reviews.author: Agathe Wolf
reviews.text: Very good and cheap restaurant plus it’s open til late !!

reviews.author: Lia Ota
reviews.text:
i went here the other day to grab a menu from here after a stressful day and completely forgot my worries as the food was truly delicious and amazing + lovely staff who are patient with you deciding on a menu/offer you a smile on the way out.

really with every bite i was shocked at the flavor! size of the place isn't huge but isn't a problem at all! sitting down and enjoying TV it was just a relaxing time. will love to come back!

reviews.author: Yufei Zhou
reviews.text: It’s the best kebab I ever had in my life and the staff is super friendly. Strongly recommend!

reviews.author: daman bhatia
reviews.text: Quite reasonably priced. Food is good and service is prompt. Sitting area is not that big and very small tables better for take away.

reviews.author: Rio Haryokusumo
reviews.text: Food tastes amazing, high quality ingredients for a good price (Cheap for paris). The place is very small, better for takeout. Overall highly recommended if you’re staying in the Bercy area.

reviews.author: J. C.
reviews.text:
Excellent value-for-price! Got a kebab combo takeaway with lower price and higher quality, when compared to other offerings in the city.

Kebab is juicy, the sauce, meat and nann strike perfect balance altogether.

Staffs are efficient, and helpful. Bravo choice for evening and night!

(* the table is at my hostel, while the restaurant also provides limited number of tables and chairs)

reviews.author: Eric Erik
reviews.text:
Fantastic place the owner couple very friendly. They have even been to Budapest at my city.
Handmade pita bread, The Lahmacun is perfect flavor combination.
I was so happy they had spicy paprika for request . Thank you for the great experience.

reviews.author: Ömer Karayakalı
reviews.text: Handmade, authentic, modest, just like the original. The classic and fresh taste, lucky to stumble upon this place.

reviews.author: Justin
reviews.text: I just stumbled across this hidden gem while walking around the 12ème…and I’m happy I did! The gentleman and lady working in this small restaurant were very welcoming and friendly. Even better was the food! They have a wide variety of selection when it comes to their sandwiches. I got the agneau (lamb) and it was both flavorful and juicy. The bread is also freshly rolled out and baked! Will definitely come back again even if I live on the other side of town.

reviews.author: Ed Jambor
reviews.text: We rented a place for 4 nights overlooking this restaurant. The owner is there 16 hours a day rolling out his dough and serving customers with a smile. He is a credit to immigrants who usually work harder than those of us who grew up in our own country. Hats off to you 'Mr. Durum'! Please eat here if you get a chance and support this amazing man.

reviews.author: Petra Tänav
reviews.text: I definitely recommend this place - especially after a long train ride. Amazing food with fresh ingredients, and the staff was wonderful. The meat is grilled fresh, and so are the wraps - thrown and baked fresh. If you're looking for a saucy kebab with fries, that's not it - It's fresh, authentic, and made with love.

name: Biyo Dürüm
address: 144 Rue du Faubourg Saint-Antoine, 75012 Paris, France

reviews.author: Malika
reviews.text: food was too good to survive until i remembered to take a photo. 10/10. best durum of my life. singing Sevgilin to the entire kitchen crew.

reviews.author: Samantha Friedman Kozinsky
reviews.text: Exactly what you want in a kebab spot - quick, fresh ingredients and grilled to order! It really hit the spot and did not skimp on flavor. Watching the crew grill the skewers in front of you made it feel extra worthwhile and only took about 15 minutes from ordering! Will have to bring my husband back! The chicken was DELICIOUS!

reviews.author: H Cinar
reviews.text: Excellent Turkish food. The people that work there are Turkish. Definitely get the Ayran with your meal. It is freshly made.

reviews.author: Dylan Filkins
reviews.text:
Real bbq for an affordable price!

You are treated well not only in food quality but also by the employees. Super clean and delicious.

reviews.author: andrea roditis
reviews.text: Was recommended this place walking on the street and my gosh it was the best recommendation. The bread is made fresh, and the flavor of the meat (we had the Kofta) was incredible. Friendly staff too. Highly recommend!

reviews.author: Lei Sevilla
reviews.text: This place is superb! Don’t let its small size fool you—the food is excellent and offers incredible value for the price. The portions are generous, especially for someone like me. The staff are exceptionally friendly and switch to English as soon as they realize you're not a local and cannot speak French. They even offer complimentary hot tea, which is the perfect way to end a delicious meal. My order was simple, but I left feeling completely satisfied. Plus, it’s very close to the FlixBus stop at Paris Bercy Seine—just check Google Maps. Highly recommended! 🫶🏻💖

reviews.author: Anh Tran
reviews.text: Ordered a burger with fries with reasonable price. Though it doesn't match with asian flavor, but good to me.

reviews.author: Fasya Khuzaimah
reviews.text: The mint tea is really good. The owner and the staffs are super kind. Thank you very much for your kind heart to help me when I visited your restaurant.

reviews.author: Hassannasrallah BERGUELLAH
reviews.text: Very good service and they gave me a cup of tea in the end so adorable

reviews.author: Tracey C
reviews.text: The only thing worth doing in paris - convenient walk from Bercy bus station, got a double burger and fries for 7.50e with a drink - staff are friendly, there's a tv and they even gave me a complimentary tea - would highly recommend

reviews.author: catherine
reviews.text: Seriously amazing. I got lamb and sister got chicken. I don’t eat salad but it sure does hit the spot, its awesome. 34 euro total including large water. Fair pricing. Super quick service. Will be coming back soon.

reviews.author: Essem
reviews.text: We came in between meals, the staff was very polite and helpful on making our choice, they did an amazing job, food was absolutely delicious, portions were extraordinary, the two of us had meals for the next few days, $35euros could’ve fed a table for 4. Will not forget this place.

reviews.author: Braelyn Dale
reviews.text: Stopped for lunch here during our layover to catch the train to Nice. Situated very close to the train station and a bag storage facility, it is the perfect place for a quick meal before your next adventure. We had the Doner Kebab and Doner Kebab plate, both of which were very filling and full of taste. The service is excellent with the only downside being the busy street on which it is located. Still some amazing views of Paris buildings. The seating outside is doable and they have plenty options inside. Free water and bread was provided for our meal.

reviews.author: A M
reviews.text:
Awesome food
Friendly staff
Very good prices
Totally recommended

reviews.author: Malak Chhimi
reviews.text: I've eaten here 3 times and it's always amazing! The kafta is delicious and full of flavor. The waiters are friendly and attentive. Great service, great food. I highly recommend this place to anyone who loves authentic Turkish cuisine!

reviews.author: İlber Erdem Tutal
reviews.text: One of the most authentic and delicious Turkish food experiences in Paris

reviews.author: Bhuvnesh Goyal
reviews.text: Freshly baked bread and delicious filling :) And the owner is fun to chat with :D

reviews.author: Paweł Wiśniewski
reviews.text: Strongly recommend. Great people, very fresh food (they make both durum and meat on the spot for you) and it tastes amazing.

reviews.author: François LP
reviews.text:
Healthy and good Dürüm, the meat is grilled when you order and the bread is fresh from out of the oven.
11 euros if you order the lamb one.
Quantity-wise, could be bigger though.
I still recommend :)

reviews.author: N L
reviews.text: One of the freshest Dürüms I ever head, he even bakes the bread fresh. 100% worth it

reviews.author: Jaiseo Lee
reviews.text:
It's what is going inside you that counts, and boy does it count.
Donner is house made; peppery with the least amount of grease, their sauces (especially sauce turc blanche - bursting with cucumber flavour - also house made), and their bread is as springy as a crumpet.
Great value for money as well as your pallet.

reviews.author: Ahmed Amin
reviews.text: Great food and hospitality . They have a diverse menu of Halal food. I tried Turkish Kebab and it was amazing. Prices are reasonable and the quality of food is great. No waiting time, close to transportation. Bonus, nice pigeons who are willing to share food 😀

reviews.author: Lærke Voergaard Pade
reviews.text: Unfortunately, very rude staff who gave me the wrong food. Would not recommend. Maybe if you are French?

reviews.author: Andrea Teofilo
reviews.text: I really enjoyed my plate of kebab here! We made a mistake and there was a misunderstanding on the order but there were so kind to fix this in few minutes! Very friendly staff. Mercì.

reviews.author: DESTINY GNANTÉ
reviews.text: I was surprised at how cheap it was compared to the other places I order from - it was my first visit based on someone's recommendations. Great service and it was tasty. I recommend

reviews.author: Ashwin Venkatesan
reviews.text: Great food. Great prices. Don’t be fooled by price rating of others. The quantity is great here.

reviews.author: Yunus emre Bozan
reviews.text: Everything was perfect, kebab was amazing. The owner was so kind and helpfull. Perfect place👌👌

reviews.author: Khelifi Marwa
reviews.text:
The staff were so welcoming and they offered as free soda and turkish tea
I really enjoyed the evening there

reviews.author: Ionut Moisanu
reviews.text: Always turkish food is the best, this place is the same, best food, best atmosphere, great people! ❤️ We love Turkey!

reviews.author: Bernd Klein
reviews.text: The owner was extremely friendly and the food was great. I can highly recommend this place!

reviews.author: Bern Meister
reviews.text:
Believe it or not..
This was one of my best Döner I've ever had and I have eaten a lot of Döner in my life. Fresh, tasting wonderful, absolut awesome! 5/5 Stars.
If you like to enjoy a real good Döner, go there when u are in Paris!

reviews.author: Isabella Harpenau
reviews.text:
The BEST kebab I’ve ever had, I had the classic but my friends had the halloumi and we all enjoyed it so much. So also a good place for vegetarian!

They add a lot of delicious vegetables which adds so much taste, I would recommend this place for sure.

Staff were also so kind! Spoke English to us when they noticed we didn’t speak French and they gave us some of their special seasoned fries to try.

We are already planning to go Sunday again. :D

reviews.author: Sindhuja Sridhar
reviews.text: Simply THE BEST kebab in Paris!! I can't say enough about how good this place is! The taste is top notch, ingredients are really fresh and flavourful! The person here is very warm and overall we had an amazing experience here! MUST VISIT I recommend 100%

reviews.author: Wei Yi Tan
reviews.text:
The kebab was so tender and had some delicious char. The vegetable medley of aubergine, courgette, etc was a nice touch. The homemade sauces blanche and harissa — so good. Gotta get the homemade bread too, it’s got a nice crusty texture on the outside, soft inside.

Good things come to those who wait. It may take a little more time than you average kebab store since everything is prepped on order, but it all goes so well together. Perfect treat to bring to the park.

reviews.author: Hiroto Yukawa
reviews.text:
This was the best kebab I’ve eaten in Paris. Unlike other kebab shops in the city, this place focuses on the Berlin style. The taste was as good as the very famous kebab shop I visited in Berlin recently. (That shop in Berlin had a 3-hour wait, so this one might be even better!)

The owner kindly explained the menu, and I could feel their passion. The curry-flavored fries were also very tasty.

If you have a picnic in Vincennes, I recommend getting food here. Even without any plans, I want to come to this area just to eat this kebab. Thank you!

reviews.author: Jims Lim
reviews.text: Friendly server . Nice place to have a decent meal ! Tasty Grill meat ! Awsome ! Wallet friendly and sure tummy full!

reviews.author: W T
reviews.text: A rare gem in Paris, authentic Turkish food and I loved the Turkish tea they had on brew which was done properly. They have a reasonably good understanding of English which helped as a lot of Parisian restaurants, you struggle with French but not here.

reviews.author: Muhammad Abubakar
reviews.text: Great serving size & the meat kebabs very nice as well. Could use a little bit more spices 🙂

reviews.author: Noorzidah M N
reviews.text: Great food and tender meat. The aubergine was superb and tasty. It comes with rice and chips. Cosy restaurant with indoor and outdoor dining. Good location and very near to Gare De Lyon train station. Reasonably priced and the portion is very substantial. All staff are pleasant and very welcoming.

reviews.author: F1 Ology
reviews.text:
Honestly such a good kebab house and love it! Been here 4 times whilst been to France Paris and would always pay a visit here whilst abroad if ever and whenever I endeavor to return to Paris France.

Such a good kebab, fresh, beautifully cooked and healthy portion size. Also price here is so reasonable! For two people kebabs cost €13 each so €26 euro! And then €3 for a drink! So total €32 which I think is excellent value for money. Compare that to McDonalds in France similar food for two cost €28 or something! So for 4 extra euro I know where I’m heading. And that’s to Grill Istanbul Kebab. Cause it’s reasonably priced, good food and healthy portion size. Great value for money.

reviews.author: E Ghoneim
reviews.text:
Great Turkish/ middle eastern food.

I went for dinner during a recent business trip to Paris, took a chicken platter with fries and Andalus / BBQ sauces really enjoyed the taste of the food.

The place is very clean and well maintained.

Excellent value and great quality for the food.

I highly recommend this place for those interested in middle eastern food.

reviews.author: Elio
reviews.text: Best kebab in the 12th🫡

reviews.author: Zelda Tobías
reviews.text: The best kebab I've ever tasted in my life. I'm not a big fan of kebabs. Also, I am never satisfied enough whenever I eat in a Kebab...but this restaurant made me visit it weekly when I was in Paris!

reviews.author: Théophile Fervari
reviews.text: THE BEST

reviews.author: Annette Valent
reviews.text: We were surprised by the good quality of the food. We had a delicious meal!

reviews.author: Beata Sancha De Leon
reviews.text: Located near Bercy Seine, about a 5 min walk away. The staff are very nice and accommodating though I spoke English. The food is quite good for its price as well - I paid 8.50€ for the set meal. I ordered the Tortilla Grec, and the chicken is juicy. They also gave me some hot tea in the middle of my meal :) Will patronise again

reviews.author: Carol G
reviews.text: Came here because it’s close to the Flixbus station and it did not disappoint. The service was amazing, such kind and friendly people! The fries were crispy and the meat was delicious! Would definitely recommend

reviews.author: Grzegorz Michalski
reviews.text: Fresh, delicious, tasty. For that portion with can of coke 12:50 euros. Good price and nice staf...

reviews.author: Bhs Brn
reviews.text: The chicken kebab I got was spectacular the vegetables on it basically melted in my mouth. The salad was very nice especially the sauce that came on it. All in all I’d definitely eat that again rice and fries were great as well! The customer service was above and beyond we just go off the bus and had a million and one luggage with us but they made sure we were able to put them up and eat without it being in anyone’s way and they charged my phone for me when I was in desperate need of it, very friendly people and amazing food!

reviews.author: Jack IJG

Really good customer service, good price and delicious food.

If I put a problem that it lacked sauce.

Kebad with drink was less than 10€.

reviews.author: Charlotte Borrel

reviews.author: Alexandre Le Hegarat

reviews.author: Gérard L
reviews.text:
A kebab just the way we like them.

The bread was warm, the fries were cooked perfectly, and the meat was good, just a bit sparsely topped, which is a shame considering the price.

The decor is quite nice and understated with touches of greenery.

However, there was a pigeon in the establishment throughout the meal, which wasn't great from a hygiene standpoint, which is a shame.

reviews.author: Amin Nakhaei
reviews.text: As someone who has tried doner and kebab in Germany and Istanbul, I can't say this is the best doner and kebab, but I dare say it. I was truly surprised by the quality and quantity of the food, and also by the very low price. The kids' menu on a plate with lots of fries and doner with a cola costs only 7 euros! It's crazy. The Turkish owners are very hospitable and friendly.

reviews.author: wenjie ding
reviews.text: Abdel  Has very good service !! And kind , friendly, recommend us nice food!

reviews.author: Afaf Juma
reviews.text: Great food and huge portions! We were two and ordered 2 plates of food and were stuffed with only 1. The portions are very generous and for the price you pay for you sure get it’s worth. The staff is incredibly welcoming and nice and make the experience much better. I highly highly recommend. We stayed in paris for 4 nights and ate there for 3 times already.

reviews.author: Emily !
reviews.text: I don't speak French and the staff was very patient and helpful and let me circle my order on a paper menu. The Naan Curry meal was fantastic and a great amount of food for the price. 100% would come back.

reviews.author: Robert Bojar
reviews.text: Best kebap in south Paris so far. Not too greasy, great interior atmosphere for the price, and great service. Portions/quality are appropriate for Paris prices! Pictured is wrap with extra meat with spicy sauce. Great french fries! They're very crispy :)) I ordered one more immediately after finishing my first.

reviews.author: Esra Komal
reviews.text: Amazing food. In just 31 euros, 4 people ate dinner and breakfast. Very affordable and delicious. We had this twice in our trip in Paris. I would suggest eating from here since it is much cheaper and more delicious than other restaurants in Paris. Quick service and fantastic food. Haven't had food like this ever. They give a lot of chicken in your sandwich which I really like. Other places are very stingy when it comes to giving more meat. Pizza is very fresh too and yummy. Food is very fulfilling. 10/10, totally recommend.

reviews.text: Vraiment, j'y suis allée y a 6 ans, c'était déjà des crèmes ! La, ils ont changé l'intérieur la carte, j'y suis allé hier.. Le Grec chargé, l'accueil top ! Du coup ce soir 23h je viens d'y retourner... Je voulais 2 grec mais il me manquait 1 euros. La personne qui est toujours présent et qui sert, ma dit donne tkt je te fais les deux... Il m'a servi comme jamais ! Je leurs en dois une. La viande est bonne ! Le service top ! Vraiment merci 🙏🙏🙏 d'habitude pour un bon grec je commande sur uber eat, ca me fait 12 balles le grec plus 6 euros de frais et livraison... La c'est 6 balles sans boisson au top du top

reviews.author: Brigitte
reviews.text:
VERY rude staff! My friend and I went to this fast food restaurant for a tray of fries. At first, everything went well, we were well received (nothing extraordinary). Until we HAD THE AUDACITY to ask the restaurant owner to separate the sauce from the fries (really nothing amazing)... A whole new personality stood in front of us... We spent 5 minutes arguing over what would happen to the sauce and fries. NO WAY, I got a "why is your face so withdrawn unlike your friend's" (even though I had literally just explained what to do for 5 minutes without any effort of understanding from him) and a "at your age, you're disrespecting me" (a phrase from someone who obviously has no more arguments). And to end on a high note, he ignored me, pretending I wasn't even alive during the rest of the service.

All this to say, do not go to the homes of these very unwelcoming and very cheeky people.

reviews.author: Léon Cloutier
reviews.text: Cheap for kebabs in Paris, and very good, the cooks are qualified.

reviews.author: Martin Pot
reviews.text: The staff didn't understand much english, but we are able to communicate OK with them.  All means from our group were great, and the staff were very friendly.

reviews.author: Pya Kura
reviews.text:
Place to avoid. The food is okay, the staff is nice at first glance, but the female manager (maybe owner?) is absolutely dishonest. I had ordered an Iskender plate for 18€, the picture clearly shows a green pepper (which I love because the spiciness and subtle bitterness really brings the dish together for me), but the female manager told me *after serving me* that they didn’t have any green pepper left in stock, and she replaced it with some half-assed, barely spicy but very bitter harissa paste. Not only did she pretend that the green pepper is optional and there for decoration purposes (?? why would you give me some harissa to replace it if it’s optional in the first place?), she only said they put it in only if the customer asks for it, which again is not true, because the 2 times I had ordered the same dish in the past few days, they always served it with a green pepper.

When I asked if I could get a slight discount because I didn’t get the exact dish I paid for, the female manager got all pissy at me.

I'm not exactly mad at the food - it’s enjoyable for sure - but I absolutely despise liars and the woman who seems to run the restaurant absolutely seems to be someone who treats her customers in bad faith. That being said, the rest of the staff has been courteous.

reviews.author: vultra uiolet
reviews.text:
We got the kebab sandwich with fries. The portion was big and nice. The sandwich was also tasty. The restaurant was dirty though. Some tables were dirty when we got them they didn’t clean it until when we left.
There’s lady waitress that was very rude and impolite.
Overall not a good experience and we did not and would not go back.

reviews.author: Tashi Dolma
reviews.text: My first experience is last experience of my life ..I order brochette poulette but they give me some brochette beuff inside .atleate they should say sorry we have got some mistake they don’t even accept their mistake .just telling me you have cut it the piece .i am so disappointed ….its my patience that I didn’t shout at them I don’t want to but I m disappointed their restaurant..I throw the meat n I eat only the bread with salade n tomate

reviews.author: Gurl InLA
reviews.text:
It could be that we hadn't had a meal in 12 hours but I really enjoyed the food here! Arrived in Paris on an empty stomach at 11pm. We walked passed this place on our way to the apartment we are staying at and noticed it was still open this late in the evening. So we went and dropped off our bags real quick and came down for some grub!

There's two sections to the restaurant, a casual, fast food section in the front and a more formal dining in the back. They cook everything to order except for the doner kebab which is already on the spinner ready to be carved.

The menu is simple, the plate menu which comes with meat of choice, rice, couscous, salad, fries and bread. The sandwich menu comes with fries and meat of choice for your sandwich and then the salad memu. The plates range from €8,00 to €12,00 depending on your choices. Sandwiches are cheaper at around  €5,00 to €6,00.

The gentleman working at the counter was very nice, spoke English and recommended the popular plate which was the doner kebab €8,00. We made sure they accepted credit cards too because we didn't have time to get to the bank. They just ask for a  €10,00 minimum purchase.

When the food came out, it was such a big portion that I didn't think I was going to be able to finish it. Unfortunately....I did. LOL everything was so delicious I couldn't believe I practically cleaned the plate! I did leave a little bit of rice though. My hubbie and I walked out very happy having had a great meal on our first night in Paris! It wasn't a typical French cuisine but it was worth it!

reviews.author: Tetuaheeroa TsuTching
reviews.text: I ate there around 8 PM on February 4th, 2026. I ordered a "merguez platter" with four merguez sausages, fries, salad, rice, and bulgur wheat, served with white sauce. The taste was great, the service was quick, I didn't wait very long, and the atmosphere was nice. However, the next day (February 5th, 2026), knowing that I only ate that night, I felt nauseous around 6 AM while I was asleep and then I threw everything up—basically, I vomited. I felt awful, nauseous, and had a headache. I went back to sleep, and now it's 2 PM and I'm feeling better. So, I just wanted to mention that you might want to review your dishes before serving them to customers, or risk being hospitalized for food poisoning.

Awesome sandwiches, copious fries. We came here one late afternoon and were so happy to get our food freshly cooked. The Adana sandwich and the lamb were the best. The kefta felt a little dry but it could be because it was the last of the meat on the skewer. I didn’t try the chicken myself but heard that it was good too.

A delicious kebab

reviews.author: Matthew Johnston
reviews.text: Perhaps an upmarket kebab shop, but with a difference. Pavement seating on hand and indoors in case the weather doesn't allow you to enjoy the outside. Service was friendly and fast. Our kebab style wraps were full of meat with added salad and this was put next to a portion of French fries. It was a very filling meal after a long day touring Paris on foot. We enjoyed it so much that we went a second time.

reviews.author: Amy Bates
reviews.text: We got so much food and the meals were much cheaper than surrounding restaurants. The portions of fries were especially large, hot, and delicious. The vegetarian meal was enormous, too!

reviews.author: Fawad Ali
reviews.text: The food is very delicious and fresh and very generous portions plus the price is very reasonable. The restaurant is next to Metro so easy accessible; we had eaten twice in our 3 days Paris stay, will definitely visit again on next trip

reviews.author: NBLâm HMUPH
reviews.text: An okay quite fast kebab shop for you to fill your stomach for cheap. Not much to say, you will get what you pay for with okay quality at this price point.

reviews.author: Filip Harasym

reviews.author: Natalia Pysklyvets

It was not far from our hotel, so my husband  ordered a takeaway.
Nothing impressive, but quite tasty. Quick service. Good price.

reviews.author: Kseniia Rotter

American Tourist. The food is good, filing, and cheap - but the best seeking point are the vibes. The two dudes working at the shop are super chill and let me relax after a long day around Paris.

reviews.author: David Musielewicz

reviews.author: Sumit Sharma
reviews.text: Ordered Pizzas and are good in taste. They have large size pizzas with minimum price in Paris. Looking forward to visit again.

reviews.author: Igor Bogdanovic
reviews.text: One of the best kebabs I have ever tried! Great food, the workers are also very nice and helpfull. I highly recommend this place!

reviews.author: Luc Mirabel
reviews.text:
Dear adventurous friend of the fork, this establishment is a benchmark. After a simple late-night kebab, I was able to meet medical staff right in my living room and almost earned an all-expenses-paid trip to the emergency room. It must have been a case of high-grade food poisoning, and God knows I've traveled to emerging countries.
Just thirty minutes after tasting this dish with its questionable smell and composition, I was off to a most engaging nighttime festival.
Price-wise, it's tempting!
However, my evening at the restaurant ultimately cost me around fifty euros, including the medical consultation.
I don't dwell on the flavors; the truly classic flavors are the real standout being the smell, which I couldn't describe. But overcome by hunger, my mistake will remain an unshakeable trust in my instincts! Perhaps regretting not having been able to enjoy the ambiance of the lodge, I opted for the maestro's second suggestion: "Takeaway!"
The result of this establishment: a bacteria added to my collection, a sleepless night I will fondly remember, a lighter wallet, but a memory, what am I saying, another anecdote, and that's precious.
For that, Dear Friend, adventurer of the fork, O MEGA FOOD will remain a benchmark in the field!

PS: Do not feed their products to children, or you will have a reduced number of offspring.

reviews.author: Elias Marzo
reviews.text:
Lol, what is this? 😭😭😭

I went there because Antalya was closed; I should have made myself some rice.

reviews.author: David Gill
reviews.text: Not very nice, rude staff, not very friendly, unfortunately we had already placed the order before it got difficult.  We asked for take away , they did not ask what sauces we wanted and still plated up the food to eat in. After telling them we wanted take away they rolled up the food and placed them in the take away box, upon asking what sauce did they put in and then requesting garlic sauce we got a yogurt like sauce in a pot which he was not happy about because you can only have two sauces and he had already put ketchup and mayonnaise in. Food was not eye catching , the kebab meat looked like sour crout. Looked like a vegetable kebab. Maybe because we were not regular faces so they thought it doesn’t matter how we were treated. I hope Google will now post my revised post. The business has responded , which is patronising just like their service  , maybe food hygiene standard need to visit this establishment. If my review is unsatisfactory, please look at other 1 star reviews . The food was disgusting

reviews.author: Teodor Mardare
reviews.text: I visited this location as a tourist, and I can confirm that it is a very clean place and the dishes are ok but very expensive, unjustified. I ordered 3 menus that also offered a drink included, but the owner of the place came to the table and asked us for €0.50 extra for each bottle, arguing that you pay extra for sparkling water and somehow I felt scammed. Also, ingredients such as lettuce and tomatoes are fake, plasticized and not natural, and the mayonnaise and ketchup are offered in very small portions. I will not visit this place again and I do not recommend it to anyone to avoid being cheated of money. Also, the seller did not give me a tax receipt.

reviews.author: Pehen Alcorpa

reviews.author: Matias
reviews.text:
This is not a kebab restaurant. This is a culinary crime scene.

From the first glance, I should have known something was terribly wrong. The French fries were pale, rubbery, and undercooked — more like sad potato foam than anything edible. I forced down three before surrendering.

Then came the so-called “kebab”: two kinds of meat, one vaguely familiar, the other an unrecognizable slab of grey mystery matter. It had the consistency of boiled sock and the flavor of despair. One of them even tasted suspiciously like potato — and I’m not joking.

Everything was buried under a disgusting swamp of sauce or mayo, the kind of thing that makes you question your life choices. This wasn’t food. This was punishment.

Possibly the worst kebab experience I’ve had in my life — and I’ve eaten kebab at gas stations in the middle of nowhere.

Do yourself a favor. Run. Don’t walk. Avoid this place like you’d avoid food poisoning on your wedding day.

I almost never throw food away. This time, the trash bin felt like an act of mercy.

reviews.author: Cristian Anestiade
reviews.text: The meat was dry and it tasted funky, in fact the same night I got food poising… NOT recommend

reviews.author: Lynn Mneimneh

reviews.author: Cyrus SANTOS
reviews.text:
O'Berlinois in Victor Hugo, Paris 16, redefines the kebab experience with a touch of sophistication. This hidden culinary gem takes the beloved kebab to new heights, offering a culinary journey that satisfies both taste and refinement.

At O'Berlinois, the traditional kebab is elevated into an art form. The menu showcases a variety of kebab options, each crafted with precision and a dedication to quality. The succulent meats are perfectly seasoned and grilled to perfection, resulting in a tantalizing blend of flavors and textures. Even the accompaniments are carefully chosen, from the freshly baked bread to the vibrant array of sauces and toppings.

What sets O'Berlinois apart is its commitment to using the finest ingredients. The ingredients are sourced thoughtfully, ensuring that every bite is a harmonious symphony of taste. The attention to detail doesn't stop at the food; the ambiance reflects a modern, chic Parisian setting that enhances the dining experience.

The service at O'Berlinois is as impeccable as the food itself. The staff's enthusiasm and knowledge about each dish create an engaging and delightful atmosphere. Their dedication to customer satisfaction is evident in every aspect of the dining experience.

O'Berlinois is not just a kebab place; it's a celebration of flavors, culture, and culinary innovation. For those seeking an extraordinary twist on a beloved classic, O'Berlinois in Victor Hugo is a must-visit destination that promises to leave a lasting impression.

reviews.author: Emanouel Baghoumian
reviews.text:
Best Doner in town!!! The meat is  fresh and tasty!!!
The staff are super friendly and kind! The restaurant is clean & spotless. They even accommodate my extra requests.

This is our 2nd time visiting them in 1 week & we will Definitely be back for more.

reviews.author: Kamila Magomedova
reviews.text: The food was delicious and fresh. I give it five stars.

reviews.author: Ivan Desiatov
reviews.text: I had a classic durum and after reading all the positive comments I was a bit disappointed. The meat was indeed tasty, but it was overall quite dry and not nearly as good as expected. reviews.author: Philippe Martin
reviews.text:
"My recent visit to this restaurant was quite disappointing. While the food itself wasn't bad, the service was exceptionally slow. It was apparent that the restaurant was understaffed, with only two employees trying to manage all the tables, leading to significant delays and confusion with orders.
More concerning, I experienced what I believe to be discriminatory treatment. I was asked to pay for my meal before being seated, a requirement that was not applied to other seated customers who were allowed to pay after they had finished eating.
Due to the poor service and the unacceptable discriminatory practice I encountered, I will not be returning to this restaurant and cannot recommend it to others."

reviews.author: Edward
reviews.text:
Title: Serious hygiene concern handled in an unacceptable manner

Review:

I am writing this review to document a serious concern regarding food hygiene and staff conduct.

During our meal, a foreign object resembling an insect was found embedded in the salad. This was immediately reported to the staff and clearly shown using a phone flashlight.

Instead of following any appropriate procedure for a hygiene complaint, the chef took the plate and ate the disputed portion in front of us, without our consent, before any photo or proper inspection could be carried out. This action effectively removed any possibility of verification.

When we questioned this behavior, the chef became defensive, repeatedly citing his years of experience and dismissing our concern. The situation then escalated into a confrontational interaction in which we were asked to “find the problem ourselves,” which is entirely inappropriate in a customer-facing environment.

Whether the object was an insect or not is beside the point. The way this issue was handled demonstrates a lack of professionalism, transparency, and respect for basic food safety standards. Consuming a customer’s food in order to invalidate a complaint is unacceptable under any standard.

Although an apology was eventually offered, the handling of this situation raises serious concerns about hygiene practices and how customer complaints are treated at this establishment.

Based on this experience, I cannot recommend this place.

reviews.author: Nguyễn Đức Duy
reviews.text:
Please come to this place, order what I did and come back to read the rest of the reviews.

Back in the beginning of month I had my first taste of Kebab in France and I was genuinely disappointed. I told my French friend that I am willing to try it one more time so I ask him to recommend me a place. He delivered indeed, this place was quite far from the center so I was planning to eat when I get home but I just couldn’t wait. I sat in the train station (as seen in the picture) and absolutely devoured the food

The fries were okay, it’s hard to make good fries and the chilly definitely helps with enhancing the flavor a bit. The kebab however was outstanding, the galette was soft and thin, the meat was flavorful and all the vegetables provide the necessary texture, freshness and zest to the dish.

The interior was nice and cozy but a bit small so it can get cramped during peak times. The owner was really friendly and there is a kiosk machine to order your food so even if your French is terrible like I am, you can still enjoy this amazing spots. Come here and eat here, I promise you will be blown away by this local spot

reviews.author: Ali R.
reviews.text:
The dürüm is very authentic and tastes great. I can also recommend the börek, for which they have a daily variation. The home made ayran is freshly served when eating in.

The staff is very attentive and friendly.
The space is a little small, especially during peak hours.

reviews.author: Christine Christiaans
reviews.text:
The food was alright and the workers were nice, but unfortunately we were attacked by the owner and an elderly lady (possibly her mother). There was a shelf with cups to choose from, and we simply chose the paper cups. We were then rudely interrupted by a loud and aggressive woman in a gym outfit, who told us not to use the paper cups but instead to use the plastic reusable cups, which were not properly washed.

We told her we were fine with our choice, but she became even angrier and stormed off to talk about us and inform all the workers. After she left the restaurant, she came back alone and started yelling at us again. We replied that we didn’t care about the cups because we were already drinking from them. She then responded that she was the owner and that we were no longer welcome in her restaurant.

Keep in mind, we hadn’t even received our food yet and were already singled out as the only Black people in the restaurant over paper cups. An elderly lady came to “calm her down,” but instead snatched the paper cups out of our hands and gave us dirty cups in return.

The owner should learn how to communicate with her customers in a respectful and professional manner

reviews.author: Sorin Latia
reviews.text:
The food si good,
We spent 12 euro for a plate of kebab chicken, 12€ for a plate of kebab, and 16.5€ for a plate of kebab istanbul, 5€ for cola, sprite and water. Total 45€! The price is somewhat moderate, considering that if you use uber eats you spend 14.5€ for a kebab + ~4€ for delivery…
But, the main advantages are: you get a very big plate of food. For example i couldn’t eat my istanbul plate, neither my wife and my child. We take half of the food home. The waiter was good enough to give us plastic to take away without cost. This means with 50€, because i give 5€ tips, you can eat for lunch and dinner for 2 persons and one 7 year old child.  I am from Bucharest and i can say it is very expensive for us, but here in Paris, this is the price… The place is good, and nice service from the staff. The thing that i like is that you can see how your food is made. I would come back again and again for this food.

reviews.author: Houss M
reviews.text:
Although the kebab at this place tasted decent, I cannot recommend this restaurant due to serious hygiene issues. I was shocked to see the staff using the same utensils to handle raw chicken and vegetables. This poses a serious risk of cross-contamination and is unacceptable. There were undercooked pieces of chicken in my sandwich, which is unsafe. I will not return to this establishment until these hygiene problems are resolved. Food safety is paramount and should be a priority for all restaurants.
Furthermore, another concerning hygiene issue was that the cashier also handled the food without washing their hands or wearing gloves. This reinforces my concerns about the cleanliness and food safety of this establishment. The combination of these questionable practices means I really cannot recommend this kebab shop.

reviews.text: The place even smells authentic right from the moment you enter, and the food is just outstanding. They even serve lahmacun which you can hardly find in Europe. This is a rare gem. Thank you so much for your hospitality and generous plates!

reviews.author: Domagoj Smek
reviews.text: Cold Ayran was magical on a hot day! Adana meat delicious, homemade durum an excellent touch. Great family atmosphere sealed the 5/5 rating.

reviews.author: Lucas Feris
reviews.text: Very good Kebab! One of the best that I even had in europa!

reviews.author: Oğulcan Bozdemir
reviews.text:
Tried the classic doner sandwhich and Adana… both were amazing!

Homemade ayran is the best!!!

reviews.author: Naufal Asyam
reviews.text: Best friend, and wonderful kebab, and also cheap. Recommended

reviews.author: Karol Demel
reviews.text: The best kebab I have ever eaten. Good job

reviews.author: Kapa pello
reviews.text:
Hard bulgur (old or undercooked?)
Their kofte is nothing more than undercooked, unspiced minced beef patties.
The cherry on top: no proof of meal, and even when asking for an old-fashioned piece of paper, their stamp doesn't work.

reviews.author: Tahsinul Islam
reviews.text:
I've been coming regularly to eat at this neighborhood kebab shop for two years. I've never been disappointed; the staff are super friendly and welcoming. The portions are generous, and you can quickly tell the ingredients are healthy and fresh.
I recommend it; it's clearly the best kebab shop in the area.

reviews.author: Diana
reviews.text: Everything was very tasty! Lots of meat and a large portion of fries! Very friendly staff! I recommend it to everyone!

reviews.author: Clara Headstrong
reviews.text: Had a hellish travel and was really hungry and tired. The people here were very lovely, didn't get annoyed when I changed and added to my order. Food was great and got lots of chips for the price

reviews.author: Iris Glas
reviews.text: Pizza is good, perfect for getting a fast dinner.

name: Zam Zam Restaurant
address: 30 Rue de la Py, 75020 Paris, France

reviews.author: Marcus Fernandez
reviews.text: Inexpensive and delicious. Their Tenders are great, as are their french Tacos and Sandwiches. They have great Kebab and curry as well. If you're in the area and looking for somewhere to eat that isn't too expensive, give Zam Zam a try. Their employees are friendly and most of them speak multiple languages in addition to French.

reviews.author: Marcus Fernandez
reviews.text:
Zam Zam is a great choice if you're looking for a tasty and inexpensive place to grab a quick meal. They have great french Tacos, Sandwiches, Kebab, Curry, and Chicken Tenders. They've been my go to place for a quick bite.

The staff is super welcoming and friendly, and most of the staff, if not all, speak multiple languages.

If you're in the area check them out!

reviews.author: jvvulperino van leeuwen
reviews.text:
Pizza dough was undone, if I wasn't very hungry I wouldn't have touched it.

Service and atmosphere was decent and it was very cheap.

reviews.author: Gabriel Peralta
reviews.text: Good food for a fair price.

reviews.author: Mohammad Abrar Ahmed
reviews.text: Delicious food, reasonable price and great service.

reviews.author: REIS J.E.
reviews.text:
📍One of the many Kebab shops in this are of the 20th Paris arrondissement. I found this one based on the google rating and the number of reviews. The ratings did not lie!

🏠the kebab restaurant has places to sit in and outstide and looked fine for its price category!

🥙The Original Doner sandwich only was very good. Great amount of meat!! Good spiced meat and the salads seemed fresh!

🥡We ordered the kebab takeaway and it was well packed in a carton box and nice firm plastic bag.

💰 Sandwich Kebab Doner was €8,- very good price given the size of the sandwich. See fotos

🛎️ Service was fine, people working there very friendly.

reviews.author: Tab H
reviews.text:
Got the Berliner kabob pita.
Was delicious,  one of the better doner kabobs I've ever had!   The feta cheese was an interesting and good addition.
Pita+fries+soda came out to 13€

reviews.author: Anibani
reviews.text:
Definitely best kebab we tried in France ,the vibe and hip-hop music inside was amazing ,don't ever change it,also employer's where super nice and welcoming:)
Respect from couple from Croatia  :D

See you again!

reviews.author: Annie S.
reviews.text: The Berliner Kebab is one of the best kebabs I've eaten. It's unique - grilled eggplant and zucchini in the bottom of the pita, meat, and a homemade tzatziki-style sauce, feta, and picked cabbage on top. Amazing. The owner was very welcoming and friendly too!

reviews.author: Cyril Martin
reviews.text: One of the better Kebab: the meat is fresh and never frozen, the sauces are made there and do not come out of a can, and the staff is lovely. Go! Now 😊

reviews.text: Good

reviews.author: Nila Nishat
reviews.text: Très Bonne plaît....I love there all. Dish because I try every dish ...I recommend this place please one time time test there kofta kebab ...adnani kebab .....♥️♥️♥️♥️

reviews.author: Julie Servais
reviews.text: First of all, they're not friendly. Secondly, the gyro (and I mean GREEK MEAT) costs €6.50 without a drink, and with one it's like €8. The portions are too small and covered in oil (see photo). The fries are frozen; these guys buy cheap stuff to resell it for more. And frankly, the taste isn't the best. Honestly, I'm disappointed, but hey, it's Paris after all.

reviews.author: Frédéric Fiatte
reviews.text: Homemade meat, unlike all the other kebab shops in the area (Place des Fêtes, Rue de Belleville...)

reviews.author: D C
reviews.text: Clean, friendly, and good kebab!

reviews.author: Christophe Fadainia
reviews.text: I was recommended to try the Buffet Dost. I was told it was one of the best kebab in Paris. My parents are regular customer since many years and they highly recommended it since it was clean, delicious, and traditional turkish food. I tried it few times and it is always the same service even at 10pm or close to midnight. Their staff is very professional, warm and welcoming. The food is delicious and their Doner sandwich is available in Veal and Chicken. They have all sort of sauce. This is a family business and everything is always fresh and tasty. Homemade bread, kebab, sauces etc. You cannot go wrong. I highly recommend it as well.

reviews.author: Armin RagE Zaimović
reviews.text: Friendly and hardworking Staff, helpful by choosing the right Dish because of my poor French.Food very tasty, delicious in quantity more than you can eat.Merci beaucoup.

reviews.author: Uupham
reviews.text: Really delicious dishes compare to the prise, i tried plate Kebab and Abana , 1 portion is too much for me but worthit 👍👍👍

reviews.author: Alex & Mayg
reviews.text: We got 2 mixed kebabs (chicken + veal) and got very surprised. Chicken was very juicy and veal was surprisingly very good! Big portions for a small price and flavour was really good. Definitely recommend if you want a good quality kebab and not be disappointed.

reviews.author: shaji varghese
reviews.text: The food was delicious and the service was excellent. This was one of the best food shops I have been at and I recommend it to everyone who is looking for a place to eat.

name: Fırat Grill kebab
address: 146 Rue du Chemin Vert, 75011 Paris, France

reviews.author: Michael Maxwell
reviews.text: Great food and amazing staff

reviews.author: o
reviews.text: super affordable n clean the staff are quick n sweet

reviews.author: Taemoor Abbasi
reviews.text: Very tasty and affordable

reviews.author: Berzan BAYRAM
reviews.text: We had dinner this evening. The couple were lovely people. The food and conversation were delicious. Thank you so much for the treats. Greetings from Mardin to Maraş Pazarcık.

reviews.author: Fab Green
reviews.text: Very welcoming restaurant. Very good meat.

reviews.author: Jaques LeCaque
reviews.text: Best mediterranean food I remember having in a long time. Great and friendly service in a nice ambiance. Fantastic!

reviews.author: Francesca Zaino
reviews.text:
We had a lovely experience. Prices are low and the quality of food is very good. They have a great variety of Turkish/Kurdish dishes, also with lots of vegetarian and vegan options.
The staff is welcoming even though probably not very well organized, yet we had a very nice experience and will come back there for sure soon!

reviews.author: Rebecca Bergin
reviews.text: Had a lovely lunch here and enjoyed a really nice home made chai latté. The one thing I would change would be the fries! They were a bit industrial. But the ambiance is really great and I had a nice view of the church from the window seat. Good value.

reviews.author: Ali Alamri
reviews.text:
Awesome place, great service the waiter was polite cheerful & fast.
The food is middle eastern and so delicious.
Atmosphere is pretty with much light around.

reviews.author: Roberta LaMarr
reviews.text: We had three different  appetizers. They were all terrific. Then we had thinly sliced lamb on a plate with salad, rice and fries. It was also very delicious. We dont speak French very well, and we had never tried Kurdish food. The waiter was very patient and helpful. He described the different meals and treated us like royalty. Very happy we came across this place.

reviews.author: Ali Abdullazade
reviews.text: You can enjoy a döner kebab here for around 8.5 euros, which is a very reasonable price for the area. The portion is generous with plenty of meat, and the quality is quite good considering the price. Overall, it’s a solid döner kebab and definitely worth trying if you’re looking for good value for money.

reviews.author: Hajiahmad Ahmadzada
reviews.text: Bosphore Kebab is conveniently located near the hostel, which makes it easily accessible. While the portion sizes are quite generous, the food itself wasn’t particularly flavorful. Additionally, the prices are somewhat high considering the location. The cleanliness and hygiene standards are average at best, which might be a concern for some diners.

reviews.author: belinda tiamzon
reviews.text: Its my second time to go here every time we passed by in avron my husband and i make sure we eat here, Great taste kebab and grilled meats. Plate is very appetizing ,the place is clean, the server and cook is very friendly . nice ambience. And the price is worth the value and quantity. Definitely will come back again.

reviews.author: fares boughdiri
reviews.text: Alone inside the kebab asked for well cooked meat and 2 min later barely cooked meat served going fast and bad with only one client inside a shame 8,50 for this I left without eating

reviews.author: Jorge Andres Villa Velez
reviews.text: Nice and cheap food. They are kind and the kebabs are quite good.

name: KEBAN - Authentic Kebab Bagnolet
address: 28 Av. du Général de Gaulle, 93170 Bagnolet, France

reviews.author: Jaroslav Vlček
reviews.text: Very friendly and helpful staff, good choice of meals, reasonable prices. Recommended! 👏👏👏

reviews.author: Aishah Saddique
reviews.text:
100/10!!! Epic and tasty and amazing. I wish I could eat here every day. Food is amazing,
Not over priced, tasty , good seats, clean, can pay cash or card. In the middle of shopping centre. Staff are polite (don’t know if there is toilets) but you have to eat here!!! Food is so tasty

reviews.text: i ate here every day during my stay. The food was always freshly prepared and the side dishes were not spared. friendly staff and very good service
